summary: The abandoned mega-complex of Degeons Laboratory's holds dark secrets. Solve unique puzzles, investigate the cause of the catastrophe, and find out why the mysterious Man in the Crow Suit is watching you. Test your mind in this scientific enigma.

name: Shattered Realm Rebirth
summary: Multi-world rogue-lite endless challenge. The surface world hides dangers, the inner world overflows with treasure. Transcend worlds and master time through soul transference. Fight your way out and escape this reality. Strategic builds reduce reliance on pure stats.

name: Chicken Chicken
summary: Enter the brutal pecking order of the wasteland! Chicken Chicken is a party game for 2-6 players. Survive mad mini-games, form temporary alliances, and claw your way to the top. Total feathery anarchy!

name: Inkoid
summary: Rule the skies and paint the arena in your team's colors! Dive into the vibrant world of Inkoid, a 3v3 hyper aerial shooter where capturing airborne strongholds with your team is the key to victory.

name: Genome Guardian 2
summary: COMBINE WEAPONS in the microscopic shooter with macroscopic depth. BUILD YOUR NANOBOT from hundreds of parts. SURVIVE the microbial onslaught once more in this psychedelic dive to the Abyss, full of mutations, minerals, anomalies and powerup polyps. SHMUP mode turns it into a vertical shoot 'em up!

name: Warboss
summary: Choose your units, place them where it counts and build an army that wins. Deploy heroes with powerful skills to support your units and swing the battle your way. Unite the clans and take the fight to the Dubdals. Warboss is a casual and goofy battle simulator.

name: Boing Over It
summary: Boing Over It is a challenge to your pride and your sanity. You’re a spring. You jump. You fail. You fall. And you try again… because you can’t stand letting the game win. Can you reach the top without losing your mind? I don’t think so.

name: Scrub Dudes
summary: A world built from cardboard, fabric and handcrafted creations. Everything is messy and covered in grime, but the Scrub Dudes team is ready for action. Climb, glide, collect trash, fix things and WASH it all clean. Enjoy this cozy handcrafted world.

name: Mega Kaiju Boom Ball
summary: Mega Kaiju Boom Ball is a giant monster-themed break-em-up developed with retro 8-bit constraints in mind. The game mixes the dynamics of breakout, pinball and legendary kaiju into a unique and action-packed 8-bit experience. Can you save the world from a kaiju invasion using just a ball and paddle?

name: Open Fire: Ready
summary: This is a very simple first-person shooter game that you can fight enemies in various game modes and maps, experiencing the thrill of shooting.

name: My Sliem Gets Stronger After It Dies
summary: My Sliem gets stronger after it dies is a fantasy RPG where you play as a weak slime. Through repeated rebirths, you grow stronger to defeat foes and uncover a conspiracy. In its top-down pixel world, you move, dodge, and cast spells—turning each death into power.

name: Hidden Raccoons
summary: Hidden Raccoons is a relaxing hidden object game where you search for raccoons hidden in colorful pixel art worlds. With no timer, you can play at your own pace and enjoy every area.

name: Neuroforge
summary: Build an unlikely army in this medieval-fantasy roguelike auto-battler. Choose from 80+ heroes with unique powers, join one of 10 factions, and conquer the galaxy’s 10 planets to impose your supremacy. Every victory, every defeat… comes down to your choices.

name: Asphalt Racing Bundle Speedway & Grand Prix
summary: Enjoy 2 games in 1 with this irresistible speed games pack!

name: Poker Night at the Inventory
summary: Almost seven years after the Inventory closed its doors, this underground social club has reopened for business. Play No Limit Texas Hold’em with four video game icons in a high-stakes battle of cards, bets, and trash talk.

name: Spinwave Survivors
summary: Spinwave Survivors is a fast-paced survival shooter with roguelike elements. Scoot, shoot and boost your way through hordes of drones as you upgrade your weapons and unlock new abilities, all while attempting the survive the chaos.

name: FoxHaunt
summary: FoxHaunt is a choice-based RPG with turn-based battles. You are the Forgotten Fox. Find and fight the other fox spirits so that you will be remembered.

name: Anomaly 404
summary: As a journalist, explore the unstable reality of a secret bunker in Anomaly 404 — a first-person psychological horror where your own eyes deceive you. Find and photograph the anomalies to uncover the horrifying truth behind "Project 404".

name: Musynx Return
summary: The beloved indie rhythm game “MUSYNX” returns! Back to classic gameplay roots—bringing you a pure rhythm gaming experience!

name: Veil: Project Conductor
summary: The train derails in an abandoned tunnel.No signal, no exits — only darkness and the broken remains of the carriage.You are an undercover journalist, and you had a reason to be on this train.

name: Breaching Harkon
summary: Breach, upgrade, and unleash chaos in this roguelike shooter where every run builds new gunplay possibilities. Stack wild attachments, forge broken weapon combos, and dive into explosive firefights against a ruthless criminal empire.

name: Tenshoku Maou
summary:
A SFW version of "Tenshoku Maou 18+".

Command your demon squad in this epic RPG and master every battle! Smash enemies through slick battles, boost your maidens with gear, and forge their loyalty. Dive into a dark fantasy saga of betrayal and power, where stunning visuals and voiced characters bring the story to life.

name: A World of Keflings: Sugar, Spice and Not So Nice
summary: The chocolate volcano, caramel lake, cotton candy forest and gingerbread Keflings are in danger of being devoured! Harvest candy, bake building pieces, and assemble edible buildings to help save the Gingerlings and drive a sinister wizard from their kingdom!

name: Tomorrowness
summary: Take flight as Juno, a small bird guided by the sound of her guitar through a hand-drawn world of music and memory. Play melodies to solve puzzles, fly through unique platforming challenges and piece together a story of grief and love.

name: Sunny Blooms Garden Center
summary: Create your dream garden center! Design, decorate and stock it with stunning plants to wow customers and earn top ratings. Manage staff, suppliers, and finances to stay ahead of the competition. Take control of stock management, interact with cash registers and experience the day-to-day operations.

name: Beer Manufacture Simulator
summary: Brew your own beer from scratch! Take on the role of a brewmaster, learn brewing techniques, create unique recipes, and grow your craft brewery into a full-scale factory. Expand your brewery from mashing and fermenting to bottling and selling - every decision shapes your beer empire

name: SoulTrigger
summary: An urban fantasy turn-based RPG where you analyze monsters' patterns and weaknesses to progress through battles.

name: Timeless Solitaire Collection
summary: An anthology of seven classic solitaire games - each re-imagined with striking art styles, playful twists, and flexible rules for endless replay.

name: Card Cultivation
summary: Card Cultivation is a card management game that visualizes the process of cultivating immortality through cards. In the game, you will play as a cultivation practitioner: cultivate techniques, explore treasures, and craft weapons, Throughout re-cultivation, you will recover memory.

name: Pokémon Pokopia
summary: Pokémon’s first life simulation game, Pokémon Pokopia, will release on Nintendo Switch 2 on March 5, 2026. Playing as a Ditto that has transformed to look like a human, you can collect wood, rocks, and other crafting materials to create a cozy home. Ditto can learn moves from other Pokémon and utilize those moves to help build your very own Pokémon paradise. For example, Ditto can use Bulbasaur’s Leafage to add greenery to the landscape or Squirtle’s Water Gun to hydrate plants. By creating a lush, welcoming environment, more Pokémon will visit.

name: Sushi Cat: Tower Defense
summary: Battle back waves of rogue sushi in this cute-but-chaotic roguelite tower defense! Build, upgrade, and reshape the battlefield each run.

name: Ratcheteer DX
summary: Explore the interconnected caverns below the frozen surface and a vast Snowcean above as you set out to rescue friend, foe, and stranger alike in this lo-fi action-adventure!

name: Pumuckl and the Crown of the Pirate King
summary: The famous German kobold Pumuckl is back with a 3D puzzle adventure game “Pumuckl and the Crown of the Pirate King”. The player controls Pumuckl through 3D puzzle levels, plays mini-games, solves tricky challenges and has to defeat scary enemies.

name: Here Comes the Swarm
summary: Here Comes the Swarm is a survival RTS with a pause button! Create your strategy, build, manage, and defend your settlements at your own pace. Take the fight to the hive mind and lead expeditions to deliver a deadly blow and eradicate your foes. Will you reclaim Ulora from the relentless Swarm?

name: Captain Puff MacFly
summary: Shmup Roguelite – Dodge Hell, Power Up, Repeat, Conquer Netunia’s Sky with Captain Puff MacFly!

name: Docked
summary: Return home to Port Wake and rebuild your family business. Docked is a realistic simulator where you operate heavy machinery, restore and develop the port's infrastructure, and manage day-to-day operations to help your port expand and thrive.

name: Trials of Valor
summary: Trials of Valor is a real-time, roguelike fighting game. Gear up and build your character to fight evil monsters of increasing difficulty.

name: Mech Fortress
summary: A tower defense game where each turret has unique mechanics. You can freely place them on a 5×5 grid, and your goal is to eliminate all enemies.

name: Solitaire Battle
summary: Slay your enemies by playing solitaire, synergize your card-powered attacks and abilities, then break the game and become the best to ever Solitaire Battle in this roguelike deckbuilding autobattler!

name: Unknown: Foggins
summary: Unknown - Foggins is a mystery game that combines puzzle-solving, adventure, and point-and-click elements. Follow an main storyline in pursuit of a hidden truth and interact with distinctive NPCs and uncover the secrets behind their mysterious stories.

name: Planet of Lana II: Children of the Leaf
summary: Embark on an unforgettable cinematic puzzle journey with Lana and her loyal companion Mui. Whether you're a returning hero or a new adventurer, step into a world where a new, ancient mystery emerges from Novo's hidden depths. But as they scour these depths, a new threat will put their unbreakable bond to the ultimate test, guiding Lana to confront her destiny amidst encroaching shadows.

name: Legacy of Ancestors
summary: From the primitive age to the modern era, experience nine cycles of life. Make choices through card-based events, shaping your character’s stats, relationships, and fate. A strategy-driven life simulation wrapped in satire, tracing the absurd evolution of civilization.

name: The Walking Trade
summary: Run a shop in the zombie apocalypse! Trade batteries, craft stock, manage your staff, and fend off undead hordes. Will you be a hero, or profit at any cost? Your choices shape your store - and your fate.

name: Whispering Memories
summary: Immerse yourself in a psychological thriller where your choices shape the story. Unravel the mysteries of a town plagued by supernatural phenomena, as you navigate the environments and interact with complex characters. Can you uncover the truth before it consumes you?

name: Armored Hongfeng
summary: "Armored Hongfeng" is a TPS game with "tank vehicle" + "MOBA" gameplay. You will use famous active and retired tanks to compete on the battlefield. The game combines the strategic depth of traditional tank battles with the excitement of MOBA games, bringing an unprecedented gaming experience.

name: Machine Mind
summary:
What to do if your consciousness is trapped in a metal shell, and all around you is a post-apocalyptic world inhabited by enemies? There is only one task left - to survive at any cost!
Machine Mind is an action game with survival and RTS elements, where you will have to build your own transportation, manage resources, build bases and blow up crazy raiders!
Collect crafts, explore locations and fight to escape and discover all the secrets of this ruined world

name: Cards and Dungeons
summary: Cards and Dungeons is a roguelike dungeon crawler that blends strategic card play with fast-paced action. Choose your hero, equip your deck, and descend through ever-changing dungeons filled with monsters, traps, and brutal bosses. Every run is a test of survival, strategy, and risk management.

name: Banquet for Fools
summary: The Pavura needs four volunteers to solve the mystery of an abandoned village. Answer the call in this party-based action adventure RPG.

name: Ascendant Dawn
summary: Ascendant Dawn is a grand strategy game where you lead a nomadic tribe in a brutal bronze age world. Work your way up from a small clan to a great empire by founding cities and conquering your enemies.

name: Ranger Force
summary: Ranger Force is an atmospheric third person, action, adventure, shooter, and fighting game that can be experienced alone, or with a partner in multiplayer split-screen mode.

name: Songs of Conquest: Rise Eternal
summary: Embrace the darkness in your endeavor to crush the Stouthearts. Raise the dead to serve once more. For the scholars of Loth know that death is not the end, it is merely the beginning.

name: Cupiclaw
summary:
Cupiclaw is a cute & frantic claw machine roguelike deckbuilder.
Grab unique prizes, build powerful combos, face chaotic machines… and claw back your relationship!

name: Slay the Spire II
summary:
The iconic roguelike deckbuilder returns!

Craft a unique deck, encounter bizarre creatures, and discover relics of immense power in Slay the Spire 2 - featuring new characters, cards, events, alternate acts, and more!

name: Rager
summary: Immerse yourself in the adrenaline-fueled excitement of this melee combat rhythm game! Master weapon of your choice – sword, mace, claws, hammer, axe, your own fists and many more! Stunning visuals and spatial audio technology puts you right in heart of the action.

name: Demonic Episode
summary: In this 4 player first person online co-op horror game, play as a group of content creators who are on a mission to banish a demon back to hell. The advanced, randomized game mechanics offer you and your friends a high replay value.

name: Dysplaced
summary: You are the Guardian - the last hope for a realm under peril. Summoned from our world into theirs, you'll venture into a vast and beautiful fantastic realm to learn, master and thrive - and to chase away the darkness. Forge your destiny from the ruins - break nearly everything to save the realm!

name: Kromlech
summary: Embark on a journey in this dark fantasy action-adventure game to find out why the tapestry of the world is suddenly unraveling itself and even the gods themselves seem powerless to stop it. Sharpen your blade, gather your companions, and prepare to make the last stand as the world around you burns.

name: Chickenauts
summary: Chickenauts is a companion based, action roguelite game where you battle evil Alien Chickens who've abducted your beloved flock. Free and mutate your chickens to defeat a myriad of foes, explore various spaceship environments and unravel secrets of the Chickens from outer space!

name: Marathon
summary: A PvP-focused extraction shooter set on the mysterious planet of Tau Ceti IV, Marathon will see players inhabit the bodies of Runners, cybernetic mercenaries who have been designed to survive the planet’s harsh environments and explore the lost colony that once inhabited Tau Ceti’s surface. Players will engage solo or in crews of three, searching for mysterious alien artifacts, as well as for valuable loot and new weapons and gear that they can add to their collection.

name: Never Grave: The Witch and the Curse
summary: A Metroidvania x Roguelite, where you advance using a cursed hat. Use a variety of magic or possess your enemies to reach the lowest levels! Bring back loot, build new facilities in your village, make a living and strengthen yourself for the next battle! Supports up to 4-player multiplayer.

name: Death Scourges
summary: Death Scourges is a linear and dark third person shooter mixed with tactical elements. You embody the captain of a special strike team consisting of four elite operators. Shoot, loot, craft and use your team to survive the unknown horror lurking in the depths of an underground research facility.

name: Desynced
summary: Desynced is a sci-fi strategy game with fully customizable units and behaviors. Gather, build, research, and explore the unknown. Alone or with friends, unveil the mystery of an AI on the edge of self-awareness and uncover the hidden truth in this blend of strategy, automation, and exploration.

name: Methods: The Canada Files
summary: Methods: The Canada Files is a mystery visual novel set three years before the events of Methods. In the last few stages of the Canadian detective competition, Detective Larika Downs is determined to discover the truth at all costs!

name: Mafia Business Simulator
summary: Step into the thrilling world of Mafia Business Simulator, a game where crime isn’t chaos — it’s a high-stakes, calculated business. Experience the excitement of running your own criminal empire in modern London, where every decision counts, every move shapes your influence, and every rival is waiting for a mistake. Stylish, immersive, and full of strategic depth, this is more than a game — it’s your chance to dominate the city from the shadows.

name: Console Archives: Nobunaga's Ambition
summary:
An undying masterpiece—the ultimate long-running legend!

"Nobunaga's Ambition" was released by Koei in 1988 for an 8-bit home console.
In this historical simulation game, you become a Sengoku daimyo with the ultimate goal of unifying all of Japan.
As the tides of war shift from moment to moment, you must determine how to enrich your domain, strengthen your military, and conquer rival nations. Use every ounce of your ingenuity to bring an end to the turbulent Sengoku period!

name: Don't Click The Flower
summary:
Don't Click the Flower is a narrative personality test where every choice matters.
Answer the questions… but remember the only rule: Don’t click the flower.

name: Reciros
summary: Reciros is a multiplayer magic FPS where guns are replaced by elemental spells. Combine elements to create unique abilities and adapt your playstyle. Play King of the Hill or objective-based team modes online with Steam friends and prove you're the most powerful wizard.

name: Shooty McSpaceFace
summary: Save your space base by shooting down the enemies!

name: New Stars
summary: Expand your own galactic empire across new stars, research technologies, and challenge great alien powers in this immersive 4X grand strategy game. Build interstellar colonies, and starbases to gather more resources. Explore a unique galaxy full of secrets, great perils, and limitless possibilities.

name: Thinky Dailies: Season 2
summary: Every day, a new kind of handcrafted puzzle. In the Season 2, the lead of our story is set to learn more about the mysterious society of the "Solvers" that appeared during the first season, and they'll be encountering all manner of new characters while venturing to strange new depths.

name: Ebaseball: Pro Spirit
summary: Experience authentic baseball with players from around the world. Feel the arc of every hit, the intensity behind each play, and the roar of the crowd surrounding the stadium. With stunning presentation, the game captures the true intensity of real baseball.

name: The Crew Motorfest: Triple Bike Pack
summary: Unleash pure power and precision with a selection of premium motorcycles from BMW, Kawasaki, and KTM.

name: The Crew Motorfest: JDM Custom Car Pack
summary: When it comes to Japanese-style street racing, performance is nothing without exceptional customization.

name: The Crew Motorfest: Audi Double Car Pack
summary: The looks of a daily driver, the performance of a supercar: that's the Audi RS recipe.

name: Moss Moss
summary: Play Moss Moss to moss the world and find secrets.

name: Little Girl On Earth Asking Why She Asking Why
summary: "Life sometimes feels like it’s going in circles." Little Girl On Earth Asking Why She Asking Why is a short pixel art Visual Novel about a girl who tell herself this, forever. Maybe you can try to help her ?

name: Shoot The Barrels
summary: Addictive incremental game about shooting exploding barrels and upgrading your weapon.

name: EOS Black
summary: "Eos Black" is a dark fantasy MMORPG published by DiGeam in Taiwan. Set in the wake of a cataclysmic war between ancient gods and the King of Giants, the land is slowly being consumed by lingering hatred and malice. Players will step into the shoes of the "Arcana," individuals gifted with the power of purification, to embark on a perilous journey.

name: Velocide Overdrive
summary: Velocide Overdrive is a brutal, fast-paced game with 70+ power-ups. Invite your friends to play for free: one copy is all it takes to ruin friendships and dominate the chaos. Only one rule matters: don't finish last!

name: Sylva: Curse of the Demon Woods
summary: Take the role of a nameless knight seeking repentance in a God-forsaken village in Sylva - Curse of the Demon Woods, a game about inner and outward exploration, chivalric action, featuring Metroidvania and Souls-like elements with a heavy focus on narrative and worldbuilding.

name: Fruits vs. Veggies
summary: Fruits Vs Veggies is a team-based party platformer where you and your friends compete in a series of fast-paced minigames. Put your skills to the test by using a range of items to outperform your foes, or explore the vast campaign to uncover the origins of the carnage.

name: Obscure Chronicle of Dynastia
summary: The vast Anti-Dong Zhuo's Coalition has now scattered, and the era belonging to the warlords of East of Hangu Pass has just begun. Those heroes of Three Kingdoms Period, Yuan Shao, Cao Cao, Liu Bei, and Lü Bu, are now all fighting to win the stakes in the Central Plain of China.

name: Water Margin Scrolls
summary: "Water Margin Scrolls" is a squad-building loot-hunting game set in the world of Water Margin. Collect iconic heroes from the classic tale and challenge other players in strategic battles.

name: Gladiator Command
summary: A gladiator management sim inspired by the depth and progression of Football Manager. Train fighters, hire staff, manage finances, build prestige, buy and sell gladiators, develop traits and stat based skills, and let real-time arena battles decide your rise.

name: Kingdom Dice
summary: Become a lord in a world of feudal greed in the turn-based economic board game Kingdom Dice. Build an empire, buy lands, collect taxes from friends, trade, and bankrupt everyone around you! (ง •̀_•́)ง

name: Walto
summary: WALTO is a boss-rush game set in the land of rabbits, built around a combat philosophy where evasion and attack happen as one, demanding extreme reflexes. Cut down the encroaching predators and bring this world to its end.

name: Hamstory
summary: is a 2D pixel platformer with heartfelt emotion and thrilling challenge. Time your jumps to leap forward—falling is okay. Find your route through the paths ahead. Journey to Haessi Star with warm encouragement from animal townsfolk, experiencing a world that transforms with every season.

name: Ball Chasers
summary: A goofy 2v2 multiplayer party soccer brawler where classes, crazy abilities, and pure chaos replace rules—score goals, troll opponents, and embrace the mayhem across wacky maps.

name: Avenue Escape
summary: Bring order to the urban chaos as you solve traffic jams in brainteasing puzzle action!

name: What Is Death?
summary: A visual novel about death.

name: KunKunNest
summary: You accidentally entered Kun Kun Nest, where there is a terrifying demon Kun Kun who loves to scare its prey. If you feel anything unusual in the room, please escape quickly.

name: Idle Quest Simulator
summary: No complex operations required! Auto-battle through the Underworld, traverse the Dragon Palace, and retrieve the True Scriptures with full idle gameplay.

name: Picto-Cross: 1 Nonogram per Day
summary: Picto-Cross is a 2D logic puzzle game with a minimalist style, known as nonograms, featuring a total of 372 puzzles based on historical events or celebrations that occur throughout the year.

name: Grind TD
summary: The gate is open, but it doesn't go across — it goes below. And something is coming up. As the ruler of a pixel realm, you will command the clash of strategies, dive deep into attack and defense, and experience the purest form of the tower defense world.

name: One, Two, Death
summary: One, Two, Death is a co-op psychological horror where you wake up in a mansion with one other person. Trust your partner to escape together — or betray them to earn your own freedom, while a sadistic creature watches every move.

name: Royal Dental
summary: Rise from peasant dentist to royal healer in this quirky medieval dental simulation RPG. Treat patients, upgrade tools, improve your clinic, expand your knowledge, and restore Princess Penelope’s legendarily awful smile, all while facing sabotage from a jealous prince.

name: The Devil Card
summary: The Devil Card is a card battle game inspired by Final Fantasy VIII’s Triple Triad. Select 5 cards and place them on the Grid. Flip opponent cards to win, collect them, and progress through the story. Defeat the Devil to earn his soul card and complete the campaign, or play with custom rules in Freeplay mode.

name: Applecalypse
summary: Point and click about apples, featuring real photos as backgrounds, with gameplay sections inspired by billiards and a Lynchian story about a -paranormal?- event taking place in a small town, psychologically and physically transforming the neighborhood’s residents.

name: Tetro Runner
summary: Tetro Runner is an arcade platformer about a sentient block trying to escape a collapsed and corrupt arcade cabinet. You must juggle fast paced platforming and precise block placement to stay alive and get the highest score you can.

name: Roommates, Romance, and Ringing Hearts
summary:
Roommates, Romance, and Ringing Hearts is a live action FMV romance simulation game where your choices shape a year of love and relationships with five unique heroines.

Experience cinematic storytelling, heartfelt moments, and branching outcomes as everyday roommate life turns into romance.

Produced by TV Asahi Japan and Aiming Inc..

name: My Beautiful Misinterpretation of Words
summary: "My Beautiful Misinterpretation of Words" is a collection of experimental art games I vomited over the span of a year. The gameplay and visuals dramatically varies every moment. One may say it is less of a "game" but more of an "experience". Now, I welcome you into my mind.

name: Zeroad
summary: ZEROAD is an endless pixel-art roguelike shooter. Fight through shifting roads and zombie hordes, growing stronger every run. Find unique weapons with modifiers, level up your character, and push further each time – solo or in two-player co-op!

name: North Sentinel Island
summary: A young man and woman, a rising YouTube couple, travel to the forbidden North Sentinel Island and vanish. Their last upload shows their approach to the island. Five days later, the Indian Coast Guard finds their empty boat drifting offshore. No bodies. No clues. No contact.

name: Taimanin Squad
summary: Lead your squad of captivating girls in this Strategic RPG!

name: Hatch Dragons
summary: Discover Dragons like you’ve never seen before! Collect and care for hundreds of unique Dragons, uncovering their origins as they grow. From playful Cat Dragons to rare Bluebell Dragons, every new Dragon you hatch and raise brings this cozy, peaceful world to life.

name: Ser Jorryn
summary: Ser Jorryn is a retro platformer inspired by the classic arcade games of my childhood, updated with modern responsive controls. A love letter to a time when forced simplicity and pure gameplay came together to create hours of pure magic.

name: Hajimeow: Tiny Box Cat
summary: Hajimeow: Tiny Box Cat is a cute companion that responds to every keystroke and mouse click by raising signs. With an integrated Pomodoro timer, this little buddy accompanies you through your daily tasks, making work and study sessions more enjoyable and focused.

name: Back in the Swamp
summary: An immersive first-person point-and-click exploration game set in a post-apocalyptic wasteland overrun by giant insects and abandoned robots. Embark on a journey to uncover hidden mysteries, guided solely by hand-drawn sketches—no text or dialogue.

name: Gaia Maker
summary: Gaia Maker is a planet-wide simulation game of terraforming, based on real physics and geology. As the planet's overseer, wield advanced technologies to reshape barren planets into life-filled worlds. Foster animal life, cultivate civilizations, or destroy them. Their fate is in your hands.

name: Mistpaw Ravine
summary: The witches are gone. Only their cats remain. Make a new home for them in this feline city-builder. Keep your cats fed and happy, clean their litter box, and endure the toxic mist of a world ravaged by magic.

name: iRacing Arcade
summary: Race across global licensed series and build your own racing team to secure your motorsport legacy in this third person arcade racer.

name: Ninja Gaiden 4: The Two Masters
summary: After the endless rain, the shadow of the Dark Dragon finally dissipates over Tokyo, bringing clear skies and a moment of peace. But the work of the Hayabusa and Raven ninja clans is never over, and chaos threatens the world once more. A mysterious foe seeks to tear open a doorway to another dimension and transform our world into a living nightmare. With the Divine Dragon Order in shambles and powerless to combat the new flood of fiends, two master ninjas must rise to the challenge. Step into a new chapter of the Ninja Gaiden 4 saga as Yakumo and Ryu Hayabusa join forces to combat new enemies and save humanity once again.

name: Blokes on Blocks!
summary: BLOKES on BLOCKS is a casual party game where you push your friends around. With simple controls this game is easy to pick up and play, suitable for everyone. Your actions happen just by moving around. Timing is everything so predict your blokes' next moves and knock them off their blocks!

name: Yankee Rabbits
summary: Waifus with guns vs. pink rabbits with bats. A corrupt cop blames you for it all. It’s cute, it’s brutal, and it makes no sense. Perfect.

name: Waddle Paddle
summary: Paddle as a cute penguin through a difficult kayaking course, dodging deadly obstacles along the way. Take on the challenge solo or team up with a friend to paddle in sync toward the finish.

name: Nuggle
summary: Nuggle is a delightfully cosy casual puzzle game with 100 levels at launch. It has a simple mechanic but you can quickly become unstuck trying to make sure there are no missing matches. It is unadulterated pure puzzles.

name: Creepy Shift: Uncle Joe’s Motel
summary: Unknown actress takes a job at Uncle’s Motel to make ends meet. She’s running from trouble — but peace is the last thing she’ll find here. A surreal blend of simulation, horror, and psychological depth, wrapped in a noir atmosphere.

name: RhythmStrike
summary: Rhythm game inspired by modern Japanese arcade titles, featuring intense visuals and gameplay, dynamic keyboard and mouse controls, and community integration. Climb the global leaderboards and unlock new content through specialized challenges!

name: Chronominion Idler
summary: Manage your party, develop skills, and shape the fate of a living world in this strategy-driven RPG.

name: Tape Us Out
summary: Tape Us Out is an asymmetric, online co-op puzzle game. Players are sucked into a VHS tape and must face challenges of logic, coordination, and communication within the universe of old movies to find their way back to reality.

name: The Succession of Changing Kings
summary: A turn-based kingdom management simulator, with an emphasis on decision making. Will you survive and lead the kingdom to prosperity or die in obscurity? The throne awaits you.

name: Pirates: Rogue's Fortune
summary: A rogue-lite action and adventure game set in the Caribbean! Explore the ocean depths in search of treasures, survive intense naval battles, and upgrade your ship to reclaim your place as the greatest pirate in a world to discover with every attempt.

name: Rusted Sea
summary: Earth's surface has been dessimated by radiation from The War. The only remaining safe havens are found under the seas. Now you must cook, craft, and survive alone in your submarine, delivering vital supplies to the Starving Survivors - all while battling monsters both real and imagined.

name: Dr. Alb's Prodigy
summary: Dr. Alb's Prodigy is a Roguelike Action RPG which combines turn-based and real-time combat. Play as a bio-mechanical android and help the doctor prevent the apocalypse.

name: Chick'n Mushroom Soup
summary: Chick’n Mushroom Soup is an anime styled Visual Novel which you've been accepted into a culinary academy with sweet girls. Although you were a total asocial in the past, you now have an opportunity to change this.

name: Casino Boss Simulator
summary: Casino Boss Simulator is a casino management simulation game that turns your dream of building a casino empire from scratch into reality. Manage, expand, and lead your own casino empire in the competitive world of gambling.

name: Exelio
summary: In "Exelio," you'll face an ever-changing environment and various threats while acquiring the knowledge and skills needed to survive in uncharted lands. Explore a world where beautiful nature and harsh realities collide, and delve into its mysteries as you carve out your own fate.

name: Land Drifters
summary: Land Drifters is an incremental RPG game that can be played idle or active. Explore islands, unlock new skills and combat classes, overcome obstacles, and more! The game is jam-packed with many paths of progression intertwined throughout the game!

name: Homura Hime
summary: "Homura Hime" is a third person action game, featuring Japanese anime visuals and intense 3D bullet curtain gameplay. Alongside Homurahime, fight against Demon Girls possessed by deviant "emotions", and get closer to discovering the truth of not only the fallen, but also your own veiled legacy.

name: Goose vs. Zombies
summary: Wake up, Goose, your village is invaded by zombies. Solve puzzles, open paths for exploration, defeat enemies. Hooonk!

name: Piyopoyon
summary: Get ready to cruise the neon sky with Piyopoyon, a fast paced one-button arcade game, while controlling... the ground!?

name: BeastBreak: Monster Horde Shooter
summary: Fight for survival in a fast-paced monster shooter focused on intense encounters, powerful weapons, and escalating boss battles. Unlock new gear, master your loadout, and prove your skill on global leaderboards.

name: Dwell
summary: DWELL is a first-person psychological horror game where players explore a disturbing environment, uncover hidden secrets, solve puzzles, and survive terrifying encounters. The game focuses on tense atmosphere, exploration, and story-driven horror.

name: TonoTone
summary: TonoTone is a built-for-VR cockpit style modular synthesizer. Using in-game waveform generation, learn to create dynamic melodies, polyrhythms, and complex compositions.

name: Pandora Corp.
summary:
Pandora Corp. is a short liminal horror walking simulator. This game offers a terrifying experience thanks to its unique atmosphere and aims to be a tribute to internet horror. Solve the various puzzles and unravel the buried mysteries to understand what really happened in this building.

You are an independent journalist running your own website. The site appears to be in serious trouble, and your freelance work seems to be at risk. When you heard about the mystery at Pandora Corp., where all the employees are said to have disappeared, only one thing was on your mind: to get there first and land the scoop of the year.

So... will you open the door ?

name: Encode Encore!
summary: A charming, slice-of-life indie RPG where you earn some sweet cash by trying out various part-time jobs—all in the name of getting your girl the perfect gift! But just when you think you’ve got it all figured out, life throws you an unexpected twist...

name: Idle Battler
summary:
Idle Battler is a progression-driven idle RPG focused on forging powerful weapons, battling increasingly difficult enemies, and advancing through a rebirth-based scaling system. Each rebirth reshapes the in-game economy and raises the challenge, rewarding players who optimize their strategy and push further with every reset.

The game features rarity-based loot, strategic progression choices, and evolving balance updates designed to support long-term growth and meaningful advancement over time.

Currently in Beta, the core experience is fully playable and continues to receive balance improvements and new features as development progresses.

name: Angel Garden
summary:
Can you feel it? In the depth of winter something stirs.

Something begins to dream of spring.

This is a massively multiplayer a-synchronous experience.

A place for wishing and eavesdropping on the wishes of others.

A place where you're protected by benevolent internet forces.

If a unity 3D world can be a bouquet, i made this to be one.

name: Stardust Sandbox
summary: A creative sandbox simulation where you experiment with physical interactions, build structures, and observe emergent behaviors in a world fully under your control.

name: AI Protocol
summary: AI Protocol is a minimalist strategy game. Control an emerging AI through a single evolving interface. Grow too slowly and you’re left behind. Grow too fast and you’re discovered. Conquer all or lose everything to Detection or runaway AGI. How powerful can you become… without being seen?

name: Derace
summary: A chaotic racing game for 2-6 players. Hit your ability at the right time, cause mayhem, and hold your line. Create a lobby and let the race begin.

name: Dig to Escape: Obby
summary: The only way out… is down.

name: Return to Dark Castle
summary:
Return to Dark Castle revives the legendary Macintosh series that defined precision platforming and comic peril.

This definitive edition includes the complete Dark Castle (1986) and Beyond Dark Castle (1987) adventures — rebuilt with color visuals, remastered audio, original music and refined controls — plus 50 all-new rooms created exclusively for this release.

Step into the boots of a new hero on a quest to defeat the Black Knight and reclaim the castle’s secrets. Expect classic challenge, slapstick misfortune, and finely tuned puzzle-platforming that rewards skill and patience.

name: Apopia: Sugar Coated Tale
summary: Apopia: Sugar Coated Tale is a comedic adventure with dark mysteries. Help young girl Mai to find her way home. Progress by solving puzzles and outsmarting enemies in minigames. Make friends and foes with talking animals. Unravel the mystery of Mai’s identity from her dark and blurry memories.

name: Core Descent
summary: Core Descent is a puzzle-platformer set in a vivid world filled with puzzles to solve, items to collect, and secrets to find.

name: Draw, Draw, Pass!
summary: Create a room or join a party, this game gets more chaotic with more people! Collaborate together on one canvas as artists and the guesser has to figure out the drawing. Will your friends make a masterpiece or a mess?

name: BrawlMart
summary: BrawlMart is a fast-paced, physics-driven party game where up to four players crash their carts through a rotating playlist of wild minigames. Every round twists the rules, every arena is unpredictable, and every match is absolute chaos.

name: Mark of Cain
summary: Mark of Cain is a cursed, fast-paced retro FPS where you're immortal, hunted, and mocked by meme-fueled demons. No seasons, no BS just blood, jokes, and pure arena chaos. Solo dev btw

name: Follow Nightmare
summary: Dive into Follow Nightmare, a psychological horror adventure where gore and macabre tales intertwine. Face a terrifying enemy and its nightmarish creatures. Survive through combat and parameters that customize your adventure. Dare you face the horror?

name: Siro
summary: SIRO — As children, our dreams are pure and burning, yet fragile. Growing up brings compromise, and with each one, those dreams fade a little. As ordinary people, we are inevitably drawn into the fray.

name: Enough
summary: Enough is a Sokoban-style puzzle game where you play as Bell, a demon who can’t bring themself to work in Hell any longer. Traverse forests, deserts, mountains, and seas on your journey to see whether Heaven will give you another chance.

name: Satsuman
summary: Slice zombie veggies, stack insane weapons, and survive the chaos! Play as a furious mandarin warrior in this fast-paced roguelite arena shooter with endless upgrades and global leaderboards.

name: Chilling Silence
summary: Immerse yourself in the gloomy atmosphere of a small northern town at the turn of the millennium, where reality intertwines with the inner demons of the main character, who suffers from a strange form of social phobia. What could have happened in this godforsaken place at the edge of the earth?

name: Salvage Unlimited
summary: Salvage Unlimited puts you in the captain’s seat of a small salvage company. Accept contracts, use your boat’s sonar to locate wrecks hidden beneath the water, and bring your finds back to port to complete jobs. Buy, sell, and upgrade your fleet to take on bigger contracts and earn greater rewards.

name: Rapid Puppet
summary: Rapid Puppet is a wild mix of various genres that forms a unique and fast-paced gameplay experience. Roguelike action in the ever-changing worlds is designed to test your stamina and reaction speed. A set of upgradable skills and weapons to become an unstoppable Sci-Fi knight!

name: Netoo
summary: Netoo is a minimalist logic puzzle where you try to place small magnets into their correct spots by rotating transporter magnets with rotators. The difficulty of the game increases gradually, thanks to new mechanics introduced every 10 levels.

name: Bochi Collection
summary: An anthology of short indie games with emotional storytelling and simple gameplay. Discover unique experiences, each with distinct art, music, and tone. Perfect for players who enjoy narrative adventures, hidden details, and bite-sized stories.

name: Cardwheel
summary: Endless runs, endless combos — every spin is a new roguelite adventure.

name: Squid Arrives II: Make Squid Great Again
summary: In XXXX, deep-sea squids receive "nuclear food" from the islands. This unnatural feast triggers their awakening, reviving the lost memory of cephalopod world domination. Note: Inspired by fried calamari. Contains allegory. Don't overthink it! (laughs)

name: The Long Winter: I Am Not an Animal
summary: You inherit your father’s tavern in a small, isolated region.By day, life seems ordinaryBut when night falls, someone always knocks on your door.

name: Ikun Go Go Go
summary: This is a 2D platformer with a trainee idol theme, inspired by the classic gameplay of 'NS-Shaft'. You will play as an aspiring idol trainee, proving your skills on 100 challenging stages!

name: Idle Rat: Island Digger
summary: A relaxing pixel art idle digging game. A clever little rat uncovers treasures beneath a tropical island while running on top of all applications. Upgrade your stats, sell your finds, and progress at your own pace.

name: Bunker KYS
summary: Survive in a bunker in this intense social game for 4-10 players. Form alliances, manipulate opponents, and vote on who to condemn to certain death. In a stylish low-poly atmosphere, your main weapon will be not strength, but your ability to negotiate.

name: DunDie
summary: DunDie is a dice-based roguelike where you combine Yahtzee-style rolls to attack or defend, explore shifting routes, discover relics that reshape your strategy, and face an eternal cycle that can only be broken by sacrificing your own dice.

name: Slice the Crops!
summary: Slice, earn, upgrade, repeat. Slice mutant fruits in an addicting incremental game! Annihilate armies of unique mutant crops, dive into a deep talent tree, unlock new levels, and research powerful fruit mutations to maximize your harvest and dominate the farm.

name: Freaking Hallway
summary: Freaking Hallway is a single-player horror game about finding anomalies Play as Tayo, a talkative government agent exploring a looping containment hallway.Interact with every object through physics-based mechanics watch for anything unusual and survive the hidden dangers before the hallway traps you

name: The Adventure of Natsuki Hinomiya
summary: "The Adventure of Natsuki Hinomiya" is an Action RPG that prioritizes the joy of exploration and is designed for short-cycle, repeatable runs.Gather items scattered across the open field, defeat the enemies blocking your path, and empower your protagonist.

name: Sad God
summary: SAD GOD is a platformer-shooter-roguelike. We invite you to descend into a pit of monsters and traps. Gain strength from coins and weapons from altars. Touch an orb. Then race to the surface before the lava gets you.

name: GagImpact
summary: Violence-themed,"Conversation & Violence Simulation Game!"As the rowdy lad Mike S Brown,knock the annoying blokes flying! Talk! Spew abuse!What will become of the lad's future as a result...?

name: Mega Trons Survivors
summary: Become insanely overpowered in a Tron-style neon grid where swarms never stop. Stack broken upgrades, melt thousands of robotic enemies, complete high-risk side objectives, and deliberately break the balance to dominate the simulation.

name: Star and Serpent Solitaire
summary: Experience Klondike solitaire through classical Tarot cards. Earn gold, claim treasure, unlock Major Arcana cards and if you win... get your fortune told.

name: Monstergirl Hunters
summary: A citybuilder where you collect your citizens. Capture monstergirls, craft their gear, and enact laws to turn them into compliant workers or fighters. Grow your colonies across 12 islands to fulfill the unique needs of your monstergirls. Or turn them all into unpaid interns and go humanity first.

name: Life Inc.
summary: Start broke. Build an empire. Climb the career ladder, invest in stocks and real estate, or launch your own business from scratch. Every decision shapes your destiny. Millionaire or bankrupt—you decide.

name: Oonga Boonga
summary: Oonga Boonga is a tower defense inspired hero hoard battler! Arrange your heroes for best defense, get items and buffs and survive the run!

name: Legacy of Kain: Defiance Remastered
summary: Play as the vampire Kain and his betrayed lieutenant Raziel. Wield legendary blades, use supernatural abilities, and battle through a world of conflict, intrigue, and prophecy as their paths collide across the dark world of Nosgoth.

name: Card Roguelike of Musou Farming
summary: A roguelike game of musou battle.

name: Teddy Collector
summary: Not just luck, a skill-based claw machine with real physics, arcade minigames, and dozens of teddies to collect.

name: Eternal Afternoon
summary: Spend one last afternoon exploring your childhood neighborhood before the world ends at 6:38 PM.

name: Ham: The Game
summary: HAM is a chaotic co-op factory management game where you and your friends struggle to fulfill endless orders while everything falls apart around you. Work together to survive the corporate grind, or watch your careers go up in smoke when the HAM hits the fan.

name: 3 Lines of a Delta
summary: It’s time for him to face a long-avoided past. See the story from different point of views and gradually discover what caused everything to fall apart. The truth is hidden between the lines.

name: Oradea
summary: A hexagonal rhythm game played on a controller or touchscreen.

name: Gaia
summary: An incremental game with non-standard counting about creating life. Because there's nothing special about base 10.

name: The Forsaken Tomb
summary: The Forsaken Tomb is a first-person anomaly-spotting psychological horror game set in an endlessly shifting tomb. Observe subtle environmental changes and choose the correct path to progress, with randomised room generation, two modes, and four difficulty levels.

name: A Game About Shooting Bullets At Bullets
summary: A 3D incremental FPS game where you don’t move, only your bullets do. You’re stuck in space with nothing to do but shoot bullets...at bullets. Watch bullets bounce out of control, numbers explode, and a quiet room turn into pure chaos.

name: Rebel Infernal Path
summary: Rebel Infernal Path is a turn-based, command-driven 3D hack-and-slash RPG. Choose from 10 classes to form a party of 4 heroes and 4 summoned monsters. Battle through dazzling dungeons and vast open fields to overthrow a tyrant. Defeat his minions, craft powerful gear, and conquer all 6 stages.

name: Anime Love Chat Girls
summary: Dive into a world of romance and conversation in Anime Love Chat Girls. Connect with charming girls through real-time chats, discovering their dreams, hobbies, and personalities. Every message counts—careful choices may spark romantic encounters and deepen bonds. Share moments, exchange photos, and explore each heroine’s unique world. Can you find the girl who will become your special someone?

name: Hotwing Hellions
summary: Hotwing Hellions is a high-octane, 2 player couch competitive arcade shooter set in a lawless space-western universe. You and a rival bounty hunter race through hostile fleets, dodge swarms of bullets, and take down massive bosses as you blast through stages in split-screen chaos.

name: Mine Puzzle Pieces of Flower Garden World
summary: A puzzle game with the feature of randomly generating puzzle shapes for each round.

name: Demon Stick
summary: You are a demon trapped in a stick. A challenging game about crossing different levels of hell, inspired by the paintings of Hieronymus Bosch. Simple controls, endless falls, and no mercy.

name: Haunted: Village
summary: In a forsaken Anatolian village steeped in impenetrable darkness, slip into a first-person view to trace the roots of a traumatic curse. Shatter the jinn ritual chain, navigate whisper-haunted corridors, and uncover the sinister secret that lurks in the shadows.

name: Dreiframe
summary: Dive into the decaying machine world of DREIFRAME, a pixel-art metroidvania packed with challenge. As a Frame, a sword-wielding robot, fight brutal enemies, exploit their weaknesses, unlock powerful but risky abilities, and uncover the land’s story through exploration and combat.

name: Ecto Mercenary Program
summary: Ecto Mercenary Program is a sci-fi looter shooter where you and your friends form a mercenary group to forge a path for yourselves. Rise from a destitute crew fighting raiders for scraps to a feared force on the station. Survival is not guaranteed.

name: Tin Lord
summary: Tin Lord is a hybrid of RTS and Tower Defense in a post-apocalyptic world where you control robots that rebuild technology and fight monsters in a destroyed world.

name: Everything I Know, and Everything I'm Ever Gonna Know
summary: An odd little visual novel about life, love, and baseball(?!) — a quiet, heartfelt coming-of-age story told through branching conversations and poetic choices.

name: Luxman Moonlit Market
summary: A strategic spatial set-collection roguelike featuring Balatro-inspired power-up management. Under the flamboyant Uncle Luxman, build the ultimate Moonlit Market while using exotic charms to trigger game-changing combos and adapting to the crowd’s ever-changing trends!

name: Echoes of Red
summary: Echoes of Red is a fast-paced roguelite shooter where you can carry tons of weapons at once, face endless enemies ever stronger and build your perfect custom loadout. Obliterate tens of thousands of enemies who dared to challenge you and make them regret standing against you.

name: There Is More
summary: In this procedurally generated mining roguelite you dig for precious ores by day and defend your city from relentless monsters by night. Each night the waves attacking the core are getting deadlier - upgrade your gear, unlock powerful spells, and descend deeper. Can you survive 10 nights?

name: Hexashell
summary: Hexashell is a classic arcade style puzzle game with global high score leaderboards, colorful visuals and fast paced decision making. Progress through 15 levels of Arcade Mode to unlock additional game modes, custom color selections and a full original soundtrack!

name: Bobo's Big Tower
summary:
Bobo is building a Big Tower to reach Heaven and become God! Bibi must conquer Bobo's Big Tower to save the world..

Time only moves when you do, so outsmart your enemies to get past them! Explore the procedurally-generated floors of Bobo's Big Tower to endlessly modify your arsenal for taking on stronger foes. Complete challenges to unlock new shop items and playable characters with their own item pools, bosses, & story endings!

Do you have what it takes to thwart Bobo?

name: Lust Arcanum
summary: Join Kyra, a half-dragon maiden cursed with endless lust, in this heartwarming slice-of-life adventure! Explore enchanted realms with a circle of unique maidens, each with their own ambition. Help satisfy their desires as you search for the bond Kyra desperately seeks!

name: Scott Pilgrim EX
summary: Join Scott Pilgrim and Ramona Flowers in a brand-new brawling adventure across space, time, and the streets of Toronto!

name: Gnaughty Gnomes
summary: Crush your friends in combat by embodying these adorable yet Gnaughty Gnomes! Throw everything you find along the way, choose cards to upgrade your build, change the rules of the game... whatever it takes to win.

name: Coffie Simulator
summary: In Coffie Simulator, run your own café, serve 500+ unique customers, and master the art of coffee-making! Customize, upgrade, and manage your shop while handling orders with precision. Every choice matters—your reputation shapes the experience.

name: The Legend of Khiimori
summary: The Legend of Khiimori is a system-driven game where you explore the untamed land of 13th century Mongolia as a brave courier rider. Breed and train horses with specialized abilities to explore every aspect of this diverse and fascinating landscape.

name: DrainSim
summary: Dive into DrainSim and take control of the floods! Clean up the flooded streets of the city using a wide range of tools - from rakes to submersible pumps. Enjoy the satisfying feeling of restoring the water flow. Become the hero of the city, one drain at a time.

name: Nauts
summary: Nauts is a space action roguelike. Run and develop your civilization in a mysterious and dangerous universe. Knowledge will be your best tool: explore and discover what is hidden in to the Cosmos while surviving as many dangers that will appear on your journey.

name: Primarch
summary: Primarch is a roguelike auto-battler centered on a single hero. After being exiled to a foreign planet, you are challenged by a fallen God and pitted against your comrades to determine who is most worthy of the title ‘Primarch’.

name: Pixelmancer
summary: Pixelmancer is a casual roguelite game developed by a single developer. You play as a necromancer with pets that will aid on your journey, you can upgrade almost anything for your hero and your pets. You will die constantly but become stronger and better with every death. How far can you go?

name: Humanica
summary: Humanica is a city-builder game about an ancient settlement, featuring vast technological development. Experience the journey from sticks and stones to iron tools and windmills! Survive, explore, build, discover!

name: Esoteric Ebb
summary: ESOTERIC EBB is a single-player CRPG inspired by the freedom of tabletop adventures. Unravel a political conspiracy with your goblin sidekick. Roll dice in tense encounters. Become a cleric of legends or completely ruin the campaign.

name: Rotwood
summary:
Hack and slash your way through the Rotwood in this rogue-like dungeon crawler developed by Klei Entertainment.

The world has been thrown into chaos, and it's up to you and your friends to battle the corrupted beasts of the Rotwood. Upgrade your gear, choose your preferred weapon, and hone your skills to defend your safe haven.

name: Vampire on Trial
summary:
A Vampire preying on innocents is finally apprehended.

Will he be found Guilty?

What does Justice stand for?

What will your verdict be?

The Court is now in session.

In this short visual novel, you have the opportunity to observe a certain trial from beginning to end, and to reach your own conclusions.

No further explanations are necessary, nor will they be provided.

From this point you are on your own.

Will you reach Justice? Or will you shrink away?

name: Sotsugyo Omedeto
summary: Sotsugyo Omedeto is a graduation exam forced upon students at an all-girls high school. Each round demands choices and judgment, leading to inevitable eliminations. The exam follows strict rules, and every decision carries lasting consequences. In the end, only one student is allowed to graduate.

name: Take a Hint
summary: Take a Hint is a comic-style visual novel where you control Delfina and must convince your best friend Ailén that her boyfriend is not good for her. It won't be easy, and no one will leave until the truth comes out.

name: Zawisza The Black
summary: Embark on a thrilling adventure across 18 immersive 3D levels!

name: Self Made: Investment Life Sim
summary: Build your empire from a basement. Trade stocks, run companies, date, raise kids, dodge the SEC, and retire a legend — or go broke trying.

name: Marceline Richenwinnier: Old Story
summary: Lost in the post-war haze of the 1920s, Detective Marceline Richenwinnier must survive a distorted open world. Battle creatures, solve the puzzle of Merrieland. Reach the heart of Merrienight in this story-driven action-adventure.

name: Infinity Nikki: Uncrowned Heart
summary:
Some say idols are the very definition of perfection. Others believe it's the brilliance of their heart that makes them truly shine.

A grand coronation celebration unfolds for Spira's very own Charisma Star—Angelina Kaleidostar Roucoco!

And yet... is our "perfect idol" truly as perfect as she seems?

name: Jin
summary: JIN is a traditional inspired strategy board game built on simple rules but layered with deep tactical decision making. Players move pieces across the board, stack them to increase value, and capture opponents by landing with equal or lower strength, turning every move into a calculated risk. The neutral zone mechanics add tension in the center of the board, forcing smart positioning and long term planning. With clean visuals, fast turn based gameplay, and a strong focus on skill over luck, JIN rewards players who think ahead, set traps, and control the board with precision.

name: On Thy Knees
summary:
A short atmospheric horror game.

Somewhere in the Forest, there lives a strange commune. They gather around old TV's on dead channels and radio's buzzing with static. They bathe in the pulse of towering pylons. The Hum... do you hear it?

name: Rosie Planet
summary: Rosie Planet is a 3D platformer genre-blender. It is a videogame tribute to videogames. Linear action platform stages, collectathon hub-worlds, open world driving, flying, minigames... shooting!? this game will always keep you guessing what's coming next!

name: The Cats of Monte Cristo
summary: A fun hidden object game with cats!  Explore detailed locations from Dumas' novel while finding fluffy witnesses to a great revenge.

name: BlackSands
summary: Trapped in a relentless time loop, fight your way through a mysterious arena. Explore, adapt, and use what you’ve learned throughout each reset to uncover its secrets and reach your freedom.

name: Can I Not Fall for Idols?
summary: You’ve become the manager of a brand-new idol group—only to find yourself drowning in romance flags from the start! Love with idols is strictly forbidden. Can you survive this chaotic, no-love-allowed romcom—the first of its kind in the otome world!?

name: S.A.F.E
summary: S.A.F.E is a co-op survival horror game where you and your friends must go into procedurally generated castles and dungeons to find junk to throw in the grinder. The game includes many different maps and tons of monsters to keep you and your friends on your heels.

name: Idle Desktop Marbles
summary: Marble Desktop redefines the casual form of marble games with three core experiences: "physical excitement + idle development + relaxing decompression!"

name: Project Liminal 2
summary: Explore terrifying liminal spaces. Horror walking simulator with reality-bending platforming and supernatural threats. Get lost between dimensions.

name: Mega Memory
summary: Upgrade your brain! Match cards, build massive combos, and earn coins to unlock game-changing upgrades. Scale from simple 2x2 grids up to the legendary 8x8 Singularity. A polished, scaling memory challenge with Steam Achievements and support for 18 languages.

name: Roguesweeper
summary: Play an enhanced version in a rogue-like style of the famous game "Minesweeper". Go through an infinity of levels and confront numerous dangers: dozens of types of mines, boss levels, random events and other mechanics that will spice up your run.

name: Rise of State
summary: Rise of State is a state management game focused on leadership and strategy. Every decision you make affects public happiness, military strength, the economy, and political stability. Manage crises, define your ideology, and try to keep your state standing.

name: Kevin's Playing In Berlin
summary: Release the author, who is nothing but the player. Release the player, and restore the freedom once taken away. A three-game experiment in what it means to play.

name: Mining Shift
summary: Mining Shift is an incremental game about mining minerals and upgrading your skills to conquer your shift.

name: Mayday Protocol
summary: The plane is going down. The Pilot sees the cockpit but has no idea how to fix it. The Co-Pilots have the manual but can’t see the screen. Talk fast, think faster, and land safely. Only one copy needed. Communicate or crash.

name: Space Digger Red Beard
summary: Go down the mine, gather enough resources, and return back to the surface. Make sure that you don't run out of oxygen on your way! Plan every move on the grid carefully, only by returning safely can you progress and uncover even greater rewards.

name: Dreamcore: Rabbit Hole
summary: Explore liminal spaces that feel eerily familiar and fire the imagination, like a dream you’ve already visited.

name: The High Tower
summary: The High Tower is a third-person, action-adventure game set in a post-apocalyptic world. After a global catastrophe, humanity builds a sky-piercing megastructure in search of hope. As the chosen one of the Church, you must ascend the tower, uncover hidden truths.

name: Don't Feed the Cat
summary: You’re stuck in a time loop from 10 PM to 6 AM inside a dark apartment. Survive the nights, uncover the truth, and whatever you do… don’t feed the cat.

name: Legends of Amberland III: The Crimson Tower
summary: Legends of Amberland III: The Crimson Tower is a classic western RPG inspired by great 90s era games such as Might & Magic, Wizardry, Ultima, the Gold Box series. Light, fairy tale, epic, heroic, slightly humorous adventure.

name: NightMaze
summary: What started as a simple urbex quickly turns into a nightmare: locked sewers, a trapped castle, a ruined village, and a procedural maze swarming with zombies. In co-op, search, loot, dodge, and survive together—before the undead find you first.

name: 100 Candy Cats
summary: Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game.

name: The Abbess Garden
summary: Cozy third-person gardening in 1643 France. As Agnès, restore a forbidden abbey garden, grow and identify real plants through the seasons, uncover a spy plot, help the community, and find romance.

name: Breeze of Ashes
summary: Command airships in a tactical RTS where choices shape your story. Manage resources, upgrade your fleet, and battle rival factions in a non-linear campaign. With rogue-lite replayability, multiplayer co-op, and skirmish modes, your journey evolves with every playthrough.

name: World of Warcraft: Midnight
summary:
The second of three announced expansions of the Worldsoul Saga.

Introducing Housing!
Before you put down roots in your own cozy corner of Azeroth later this year, jump into our virtual tour for an early glimpse at the customization options that await you.

Explore New and Reimagined Zones
The battle between the Light and the Void spans across four zones as you discover new allies and confront ancient enemies.
- Silvermoon City
- Eversong
- Zul'Aman
- Harandar
- Voidstorm

New Features and Improvements
As the Void invasion descends upon Quel'Thalas, an array of new features add more depth and improvements to our evolving world.
- Prey
- Devourer Demon Hunter
- Haranir
- Dungeons and Raids
- New and Returning Player Experience
- Transmog Updates

name: Draculesti
summary: Draculesti is a villain-focused reimagining of the classic novel Dracula that shines a light on the shadowy figures of Renfield, Dracula's Brides, and Dracula himself. Be enthralled by the residents of Castle Dracula, and thrill at a dark narrative with strong LGBTQI+ themes.

name: Back to Stables
summary:
Back to Stables is a cozy puzzle adventure where you guide the escaped horse, George, through a maze of obstacles. You lure George with apples, help him avoid scary forest creatures, and guide him safely to the trailer using as few apples as possible.

The game has a cozy, relaxed atmosphere, with stylized visuals. Throughout the levels, you can unlock customization options for George, from new skins to accessories like hats and bows.

name: LoopiaLike
summary:
LoopiaLike — A bullet heaven roguelite where spell fusion changes everything.

Choose your wizard, survive endless waves of enemies, fuse spells into devastating combos, and become unstoppable. Every run is different. Every build is unique.

name: Happy Harvest
summary: A cozy themed, idle incremental farming game.

name: Blood Night
summary: (Multiplayer | COOP) THE FOREST IS DEAD. YOU ARE NOT. Survive. Build. Kill everyone. A world where zombies are smarter than they look. Inventory, crafting, and building are your tools in the war for tomorrow.

name: Aurora Hills: Chapter 2
summary: Aurora Hills: Chapter 2 is the second part in series of point and click puzzle adventure games. Follow the journey of Ethan Hill, a park ranger tasked with investigating strange disappearances from a national park to uncover the mystery of Aurora Hills!

name: Battle Narf
summary: An extremely late entry for the Vextro Unplugged jam, strongly inspired by Battle Kid, Fortress of Peril.

name: Monster Ops 16
summary: Season 2 of Monster Ops! Black Ops soldiers Wraith and Tide know the world is against them, and they can only rely on each other. Two soldiers, forced to go rogue, with a desperate mission. There's no one left they can trust. A NSFW Gay Visual Novel Dating Sim put out in Monthly Episodes!

name: Doppleganger
summary:
A mannequin lies disassembled on the bed.

A window is blocked with steel bars.

You must find a way out of the room.

This is a point and click escape room game, around 30-60 minutes long

name: Vapinupituru
summary: Submission for the Cookie Cutter RM2k3 Jam.

name: OneShot Challenge
summary: A challenging roguelike where you control a single bullet. Redirect it with your frying pan, dodge the chaos, and master every room.

name: Corner Streamer
summary: Corner Streamer is a chill idle game where your avatar streams from the corner, earning views, donations, and sponsors. Customize your look, upgrade your setup, and climb to the top of the streaming world.

name: Humanity's Fall
summary: Explore the world of Humanity's Fall, a fantasy farming sim. Interact and build a community with the world's next apex lifeform. Build your farm and rediscover lost flora as you discover the world's lore.

name: For Stella
summary: For Stella is an interactive narrative game centered around psychological disorders. “Why would someone who has spent their entire life suppressing their emotions suddenly pull you aside to talk about love?”

name: BaulaQuest
summary: Local middle school teacher fights angry orange bald man army with marbles and furry creatures. Baula. Quest. BaulaQuest.

name: Safe House
summary: Survive the plague. Manage a Safe House. Decide who to trust. A cinematic, story-driven psychological horror with multiple endings.

name: Winter Survivor Protocol
summary: A multiplayer survival game. Players take on the role of survivors in a dire situation, searching for resources, crafting weapons, surviving amidst zombies and unknown dangers, and uncovering the secrets of the catastrophe.

name: Metrocity
summary: Play Metrocity, a challenging and innovative city builder game. prove your ability to organize and create the best city in the world. develop your city from 0 to thousands of people only in this game.

name: Rollbound
summary: Rollbound is a short, experimental clicker set at a lonely tavern table, where a single die decides everything. Earn points and gold to upgrade Attack, Defense, Luck, and Gold gain as the stakes climb.

name: Grotto Escape
summary: You play as a SF character facing Heroic Fantasy creatures in this Dungeon Crawler with Platformer gameplay.

name: Nonsense Defense
summary: Roguelite tower defense with moveable chaos. Build towers and troops, drag them mid battle, dash through danger, and defend your crystal solo or with up to three friends in online co op.

name: BattleSail
summary: BattleSail is an action tactical strategy game where you command a fleet in turn-based naval battles. Manage resources, upgrade and outfit your ships, and navigate a richly designed single-player Campaign or jump into fast Arena encounters, or test pure thinking in one-turn Puzzle challenges.

name: Techno: 2Kill
summary: A hardcore, fast-paced and unpredictable roguelike shooter set in a dystopian future where AI decided to save humanity... by exterminating it. Your body is the ultimate weapon. Liberate Earth and countless other planets from the grip of a deranged AI.

name: Tool Land
summary: Tool Land is an adventure exploration platformer puzzle game. Collect tools with unique functions, uncover the secrets behind various mechanisms, and explore every corner of this hand-drawn doodle art world!

name: Propaganda vs. Zombies 2
summary: Fight through Hordes of Zombies while rescuing other survivors but every shot you make creates noise that attracts more Zombies towards you, your subordinates, and your Camp. Build your camp and make your decisions to assure the safety of your People!

name: Super Ant Art Tycoon
summary: You're an art dealer with nothing but ants. They paint. You set the prices. Sometimes it sells, sometimes it doesn't. Grow your colony, design galleries, and become absurdly wealthy in this fully remastered 3D idle tycoon game where the artists are tiny and the ambition is enormous

name: Scraps: Hellmouth Creek
summary: A scrapbooking adventure. Ride bikes, float down rivers, and explore the woods while capturing photos and arranging your own scrapbook pages.

name: Parcel Peaks
summary: A difficult fully physics based ski simulator where you deliver items down insane slopes. The controls are few, but difficult to master.

name: The Pinkman Files
summary: The Pinkman Files is a mini-game rich, fast paced, turn based combat game with a side of visual novel, that will challenge your detective skills and allow you to uncover the secrets of a peculiar town.

name: Ironforged
summary: Slow-paced, tactical VR shooter where every mistake is punished. You fight with a minimal arsenal - your pistol, composure, timing, and precision. Wake up as CM-42 and fight your way out of a relentless combat training facility designed to break the weak and forge perfect soldiers.

name: Kila: Hourbound
summary: Journey through the fantastical world of Aion as Kila, a Keeper of Time. In this single-player action-adventure platformer, you explore floating islands and combat savages who are stealing time. With a magical staff and time manipulation at your hand, fulfill your destiny and restore peace to Aion.

name: Lila's Atelier
summary: Lila’s Atelier is a casual action game where players can craft items across uniquely themed stages. Use dashing, throwing to dodge obstacles while watching out for traps and pitfalls. Earn enough points to unlock new stages and challenges, and help Lila and Jasmine find their way home

name: Dramatour
summary: In this local split-screen multiplayer game, 2-4 players compete to build the tallest tower by stacking randomly selected 3D objects.

name: Another Game About Automation
summary: Another Game About Automation is a casual factory-building where you have to generate numbers and combine them with mathematical operations. Upgrade and unlock new mathematical operations.

name: Eerie Dossier: The Haunted Apartment
summary: "Eerie Dossier:the Haunted Apartment"is a walking simulation game that combines horror and horror elements.You will be trapped in an infinite loop of corridors and rooms, searching for opportunities to escape from this place while also discovering its secrets

name: Kuromaku
summary: Kuromaku Is An Indie First-Person Psychological Thriller Experienced From A Child’s Perspective. Complete Chores Assigned By Your Mother, Uncover Hidden Secrets, And Survive Unsettling Encounters. Objectives Must Be Completed To Progress Further Into The Rich, Unfolding Story.

name: Ember Island
summary: Relive the arcade glory days in Ember Island, a relentless quarter burner where every mistake costs blood and time. Fight through 12 deadly zones as a Knight, Mage, or Rogue. Chase high scores for lives, hit the checkpoints, and use unlimited continues to earn your mastery. Play the demo now.

name: Truck License Trainer
summary: Drive a simulated truck to gain knowledge and intuition of a real thing while having fun. Challenge yourself with real-life scenarios or almost impossible maps.

name: Labyrinthesis
summary: Navigate your way through floors of enemies and descend deeper into an underground laboratory. Hack your gun to unlock new weapons, and defeat the machine guarding the elevator.

name: Magic Tower: Legion
summary: "Magic Tower: Legion" is a roguelike Magic Tower-like game. You will play as a legion commander and lead your team into the magic tower. Use each character's strengths to defeat powerful enemies. Remember to plan every step carefully, for all resources in the magic tower are non-renewable.

name: Under the River
summary: Under the River is a romance visual novel set in Ming China’s world of spirits and the strange.As an opera singer,you return to Sui'an County to perform for the River God. However, a strange accident leads you to don a demonic skin, transforming you into a half-human, half-ghost.

name: Wordy Online
summary: Rediscover the fun of wordplay in this modern, colorful collection of popular games with fresh ideas! Play through the campaign or a huge dictionary of words: learn, earn rewards, track your progress, and even climb the leaderboards — play solo, with friends, and with players worldwide!

name: Three Jokers
summary: A card roguelike inspired by Balatro and Cuphead. Fight duels, play insane mini-games, build Joker City and rise to greatness — in Three Jokers!

name: StarDrift Delivery
summary: Smuggle your way to freedom in this fast-paced space delivery action roguelite where you are in debt to the mob. Blast through asteroids for speed, weave through chaos, and deliver packages to survive. Don't let the debt consume you.

name: Entrance No.9
summary: A drunk man returns home, but the familiar stairwell turns into an endless, distorted maze. Floors repeat themselves, doors disappear, and every wrong step takes you back to the beginning. Can you make it to your apartment?

name: Cleaning Raccrew
summary: Cleaning Raccrew is a 4 player party game inspired by sumo, japanese game shows, and silly raccoon images!

name: Stalker From Willowfield St.
summary: A stalker is terrorizing the neighborhood, and you’re next. Watch for signs he’s been inside your house and make the right choices to avoid becoming his next victim. Test your observation skills in this Exit 8-style game where the threat isn’t supernatural, but a real man and you have three choices.

name: Roguegg: Hardboiled Survivors
summary: Roguegg: Hardboiled Survivors is a top-down roguelike bullet heaven where you play as a brave egg fighting hordes of bugs. Collect upgrades, manage your grid inventory, and craft unique builds to survive the swarm before they scramble you!

name: Detective 26
summary: DETECTIVE 26 is a relaxing, turn-based mystery board game for 5-minute investigations. Roll dice and traverse low-poly maps to gather clues. Use logic to unmask the Wanted before turns run out! Level up your rank, unlock new content, and master the art of being a true detective!

name: Moon and Fang
summary: Unite the strength of the Vampires and the Werewolves and combine their defenses in a unlikely alliance to defend from the humans. Select your moves between playing cards, earning coins or unlocking stronger decks to survive their rampage. Choose your desired rewards and build unique decks!

name: NolyRhythm
summary: Get into the rhythm of the music! If you keep getting into the groove, you'll clear the game before you know it! This is the casual rhythm game "NolyRhythm"!

name: ArvusForge
summary: Craft your own weapons and carve your path in this fast-paced 3D roguelike action game. Defeat enemies, collect materials, and build powerful gear as you progress through a node-based world. Every run is a new challenge with randomized skills and endless crafting possibilities.

name: One Shot Challenge
summary: A challenging roguelike where you control a single bullet. Redirect it with your frying pan, dodge the chaos, and master every room.

name: Alice Landing
summary: Alice Landing is a vertical scrolling, real-time reaction dodging game. Control Alice as she lands in city ravaged by totalitarianism and war, dodging obstacles, collecting scattered codons, following Alice searches for her brother, unlocks encyclopedia entries, and unravels the final secret.

name: Nine Skies
summary: Nine Skies is a myth-inspired roguelite bullet heaven. As an ancient deity, command auto-firing divine artifacts through the Nine Heavens. Survive hordes of mythical beasts in fast-paced, screen-filling combat where power meets elegance.

name: Idlemon
summary: Idlemon is an idle desktop monster tamer. Played on the side of your screen, your monster will gain experience and collect monster eggs. Upgrade your stats, purchase and collect cards, used to decorate your island.

name: Honor Mice
