summary: Dash, slash, and shoot through handcrafted levels across vibrant worlds in a fast-paced action platformer! Stop the forces of evil from stealing your mysterious lunch and uncover the destiny that awaits you!

name: Saccharine Echo
summary: Saccharine Echo is a story that walks the line between psychological drama and dark paranormal romance. Your choices will shape the fate of a young woman haunted by an obsessive entity from another world.

name: One Tower Defense
summary: One Tower Defense is a Roguelike Tower Defense game where you control a single tower. Gather resources, buy weapons and upgrades, and fight endless waves of enemies. Play in single-player mode or in multiplayer mode, where the last survivor wins.

name: Genetica: Extinction
summary: Your goal is simple - prevent total extinction. The ecosystem reacts to every decision you make. Hunger, predators, and climate shifts will constantly test the limits of evolution.

name: Grand Valor
summary: Grand Valor is a fast-paced fantasy action platformer featuring a tiny knight on a daring quest, blending swift movement and intense combat as you navigate challenging levels and defeat enemies with agility and skill.

name: Gnomed
summary: Gnomed is a roguelite clicker base defence game where your humble home is the last line of defense. Hold out against 20 chaotic waves of enemies, unlock new abilities, and grow stronger each run!

name: Tow the Line
summary: Chained together meets tow trucks in this challenging platformer. Play solo or co-op!

name: 3D Escape Room: Cursed Legacy
summary: After waking up in the manor’s basement, you discover that you’ve aged at an abnormal rate. As you fight to survive, clues and records from different eras gradually bring the mystery into focus. When you become young again, you will inherit the true “legacy”.

name: Chees
summary: What if your chess pieces lied to you? In CHEES, rooks crawl like pawns, queens leap like knights, and every game shuffles the rules. Outsmart the chaos in local PvP or challenge the AI. Think you can adapt?

name: Abattoir: Cow Escape
summary: The pinnacle of CowGame technology. Cow Escape is a single-player action game set in a dystopian near future. Play as a cow in the resistance against the meat industry. Fight to free calves from the slaughterhouse, survive endless waves in the rodeo and utilize your powers to destroy Cowmen thugs.

name: SolveIt! A Puzzle Solving Simulator
summary: SolveIt! invites you into the world of twisty puzzles - from the timeless Rubik’s Cube to unique and challenging shapes. Whether you’re a casual solver or a speedcubing enthusiast, SolveIt lets you practice, compete, and learn - all in one place.

name: Lost & Found
summary: LOST & FOUND is a free to play dynamic sorting game. Match forms to the right items and build your own warehouse, or compete with your friends in multiplayer mode after your shift is over.

name: Five Dice
summary: A deck-building strategy game where you roll FIVE DICE and blend tactics with luck to prevail in battle!

name: Knights End
summary: Work together to survive the knight shift in this co-op PvE horror game. Serve your villagers’ as a disgraced knight by completing their commands in a cursed kingdom. Reclaim your lost honor to earn items and a chance at your freedom.

name: Bootleg Alchemist
summary: It's prohibition , time to bootleg like never before. As an exiled Alchemist on your path to redemption.Negotiate contracts from taverns to produce liquor and earn coin. Use your alchemy skills to evade guards , bandits and boost production, Help civilians and regain your status.

name: Mushroom Nook
summary: Mushrooms of all kinds—adorable, quirky, and even some with unique abilities—are spring up randomly on your computer! Collect and nurture them, then decorate with various objects to create your own cozy mushroom haven, keeping you company while you work, study, or simply unwind.

name: King of Santa
summary: King of Santa is a competitive party action game for up to four players, where players take on the role of Santa, collect presents scattered across the stage, and deliver them to chimneys to earn points and win the match.

name: Forthold
summary: Hold the fort as a lone archer in this short incremental defense game. Shoot waves of enemies, collect magic and soulshards, upgrade your power, and ascend to push further toward the source of the relentless darkness.

name: Underdog Futsal
summary: Become the manager of a small neighborhood futsal club, recruit players on a tight budget, and build your tactics. Manage morale through team activities, shift the momentum with substitutions and tactical changes in tense text-based matches, and grow your team step by step.

name: Tiny Utopia
summary: Wield over 15 unique magical tools and traverse more than 12 vastly different themed worlds in an unprecedented hidden-object adventure. In Tiny Utopia, every click is filled with strategy and wonder.

name: Devour the Elixir
summary: A dark tactical puzzler where you consume poison to gain power. In a world void of Qi, use [Foresight] to see enemy intent. Outmaneuver foes using [Movement Cards] and lure them into deadly traps. Perfect information, no random dodging. Only pure strategy saves you from death.

name: Upbeat
summary: Jump, bounce, and drum your way up an infinite climb. Build a beat, spawn platforms with your drum machine, and chain physics-powered combos to outclimb the competition in this rhythmic precision platformer.

name: Zumbi Olé: The Minigame
summary: Zumbi Olé is unlike anything you've ever played: an action-survival game where you don't just fight… you OLÉ! Outplay clumsy zombies, dominate infested arenas, wipe out undead hordes and rack up points to show the world your true OLÉ skills.

name: Phantom the Huntress
summary: Not sword-clanging trash. Not glitter-magic garbage. Bow only. The rest is for peasants. I’m Phantom, elite huntress, eternally exhausted. You’ll track, gather, goblin-slay, babysit dumb NPCs and rank up at snail pace. Wishlist now. I get bonus wine money. Do it or vanish. My patience is dead.

name: Cuberio
summary: A casual strategy-puzzle game where you guide a cube through 100 handcrafted mazes, avoid moving hazards, collect coins, and unlock upgrades.

name: Paws Coven
summary: These damn cats worship eldritch gods and summon monsters from other dimensions in my backyard again. And now they are- Wait! Why did they stop?

name: Peasant or Rebel?
summary: A chaotic, asymmetrical party game for up to 5 players! One player becomes the Lord, while the others are Rebels hiding among the Peasants. Will the Lord expose them in time - or be overthrown?

name: Crazy Hotel Together
summary: Discover Crazy Hotel Together, a hotel management game where you and your friends have to run a rather unusual hotel! Fulfill your guests’ requests and upgrade your establishment to transform it from a low-cost hotel into a palace!

name: Mewlin the Clicker
summary: Click to roll the crystal ball across the table, dodging obstacles and facing bosses while building a deck of cards that completely changes your strategy with every run. Help Mewlin, a very curious orange cat, make a total mess in this magical clicker with deckbuilding elements.

name: SokoGhost: Unfinished Business
summary: Pass through obstacles in this block-pushing puzzle game! Beat all levels of the Box Corp skyscraper and reach for the stars by thinking through the box!

name: Pawns Survival
summary: Pawn Survival is a turn-based survival strategy game where you command a small community of pawns struggling to survive, send them to gather resources, explore unknown lands, grow your village, and forge powerful equipment to withstand whatever this brutal world throws at you.

name: Pack and Ship: Warehouse Simulator
summary: Build your logistics empire from the ground up. Choose the most profitable contracts, optimize your warehouse layout for maximum efficiency, and upgrade your equipment. Balance risk and reward as you adapt your strategy to a shifting market. Every lift, every pallet, and every decision counts.

name: Zero Stress King: Idle Defense
summary: A short relaxing incremental game disguised as a tower defense, but enemies can’t reach your walls. Thanks to lava.

name: Slime Must Grow
summary: Slime Must Grow is a single-screen incremental game about one thing: make the slime grow.

name: Sky Drill
summary: Jump, boost, and strategize your way through increasingly difficult levels in this 2D roguelite platformer. Use equipment combos to tear through the stratosphere in ridiculous bursts of speed. Drill deep into the earth, mining mountains of gold, precious gemstones, and more.

name: Mahjong Inkflow
summary: This a 2D ink-wash solo game blending classic mahjong wins with light roguelikes. In game, you'll play as an ink drop, defeat foes by completing mahjong hands. Collect cards & orbs on the way, gain skills from special enemies, and experiment with builds in this vivid world!

name: Ju-men: Cursed Masks
summary: “JU-MEN: Cursed Masks” is a short horror game about organizing countless masks and noticing subtle anomalies. Masks may change when you’re not looking—their color, shape, gaze, or position. What you notice depends on how carefully you’ve arranged them.

name: Divinity Vassals
summary: A pixel-art creature collection, raising, and combat game. Capture and train unique creatures with distinct genes and talents. Hundreds of skills can be freely combined, with each upgrade offering an extra talent draw chance.

name: Socks!
summary: Strategic, Satisfying Sock Packing Action! Pair up socks, fresh off the clothesline, in this cute and relaxing physics-based puzzler. Match two socks to roll them up into an adorable bundle and free up space in your sock basket. But don't let your bundle basket overflow either! Pack wisely!

name: Fruitbearer
summary: An edgier, darker, thrilling and less casual Suika game turned roguelike deckbuilder.

name: Case 1963
summary: Case 1963 is a 2D narrative and educational experience set in 1960s England. Explore the stories of three characters while solving puzzles and facing challenges that test skill and strategy.

name: Noodle Hustle
summary: You will play as a side road street food seller, cook noodle and serve customer, and of course earn money. At the end of the day will you manage to pay the bills for your hospitalized grandma, and save her?

name: But Why Penguin?
summary: Nothing matters. You left your monotonous colony behind. Complete tasks, chase your dreams, walk across the ice while humans watch you, and uncover the secret that will be revealed in 2027. But why?

name: The Last Cat in the Universe
summary: Gather the remains of a dying space station to build a cozy home for the last cat in the universe. A short, narrative-driven incremental game about finding peace in the face of darkness

name: Molekraft
summary: 3D Strategy Puzzle game in which you control moles and have to guide them to the exit of the level.

name: Stained Blade
summary: Stained Blade is a multiplayer VR melee game built around something most VR sword games fake: real, server-driven physics.

name: The Saint
summary: The Saint" is a first-person psychological horror set in eerie liminal spaces with VHS body cam visuals. Explore a decaying dreamworld, solve symbolic puzzles, and escape a nightmare inspired by the dread and mystery of Silent Hill.

name: Emoji Marble Dash
summary:
emoji Marble Dash represents a new generation of Web3 gaming, where blockchain enhances rather than complicates the player experience. Officially licensed by the emoji company and built on Immutable zkEVM, the game demonstrates how true digital ownership can seamlessly integrate into competitive arcade racing.

The game features physics-driven marble racing, where players control emoji characters riding on top of rolling marbles. Unlike traditional racers, this momentum-based system creates skill-based gameplay where physics mastery determines victory across 6-player multiplayer competitions.

All Web3 features are completely optional. Traditional players enjoy the full racing experience without ever touching crypto, while Web3 enthusiasts unlock ownership features through simple Immutable Passport integration (email, Google, Apple ID login – no wallet setup required).

Items earned through gameplay can be minted as NFTs or SFTs and traded on the dedicated emoji marketplace. Immutable zkEVM's gasless transaction technology means players never pay blockchain fees.

Quick Race: Barrier-free entertainment with no blockchain requirements Ranked Mode: Competitive play with $EMJ token entry fees and cryptocurrency prize pools distributed to top performers.

emoji Marble Dash follows full MiCA (Markets in Crypto-Assets) compliance, ensuring regulatory adherence for the European market. The $EMJ token (ERC-20, 10 billion fixed supply) powers the ecosystem with a Token Generation Event scheduled for Q1 2026.

Developed by El Dorado Studio and published by Euronext-listed Crypto Blockchain Industries (ALCBI), emoji Marble Dash launches in early 2026, demonstrating that accessible Web3 gaming is achievable when player experience comes first.

name: Landlord
summary: "Landlord Chess" turns the ever-changing strategies in card games into visual scenarios, makes it more like playing chess or Sudoku. It includes a single-player mode and a multiplayer online mode, while also integrating a leaderboard and an achievement system.

name: Medieval Life Simulator
summary: Rise from nothing to wealth! Mine ore, harvest crops, cut trees, gather livestock products, sell resources, hire workers, buy rentable houses, gamble with card games, bet on fights, and expand into an empire.

name: Duck Duck Hotel
summary: A 3D cute management sim where you're a duck building and operating a treetop hotel for a variety of bird species. Strategically expand your tree, cater to each species' unique needs, and keep your feathery guests happy through all four seasons. Just don't ruffle any feathers, or it's game over!

name: What’s in the Box?
summary: A first-person incremental game where you buy and open containers filled with random items, repair and upgrade the things you find, and sell them for profit. In a dark industrial environment, upgrade your character, tools, and machines, earn money, and step by step work your way toward freedom.

name: Sunken Sky
summary: Welcome to the world of Sunken Sky and get ready for an epic action adventure through a vast open world. No place is beyond your reach - from the tallest mountains to the very minds of others. Battle bizarre creatures and befriend even stranger people. All in a detailed, hand-drawn 2D style.

name: Autocard: Your RPG Adventure
summary: Autocard is a card game, it's an Autobattler with Deckbuilder, Roguelike and RPG elements. Build a powerful board, unleash insane combos, and climb from zero to hero in under an hour!

name: Sheol no Mori: Tasogare no Majuuzukai
Birdseed VR
summary: Snap pics of the chunkiest, cutest birds in VR! Relax in lush forests, complete quirky daily quests, and fill your Journal. Whether you’re birding alone or together with friends, get cozy and escape to nature.

name: Cosmic Castaway
summary: Cosmic Castaway is a colony building survival game. Gather scarce resources, rescue and assign your crew, build and defend your outpost from hostile forces, and turn wreckage into refuge to repair your ship and escape back to your home planet.

name: Tales of Fear: Episode Zero
summary: Can you tell the difference between reality and tale? Experience three short horror stories and gather clues as to which are true and which are just part of our imagination. Immerse yourself in the protagonist's perspective and discover eerie tales from around the world.

name: Gears Of Glory
summary:
Gears of Glory is a movement-based Tower Defense where you drive a van across the map to collect Gears, build powerful towers, and stop the robots from destroying your bases.

Developed for PC, Gears of Glory combines classic Tower Defense strategy with a unique twist: driving a stylish van through the chaos of a post-apocalyptic world.

Featuring a top-down pixel art look and fast-paced gameplay, the player takes on the role of a resistance pilot tasked with protecting the last human bases from hordes of robots that have taken over the planet and isolated humanity. To succeed, you’ll need skill behind the wheel, dodging obstacles or running enemies over. All while building towers with strategic synergies capable of turning the tide of battle.

Speed, strategy and survival collide in this game where every turn can mean the difference between extinction and the salvation of humanity.

The game’s inspiration comes from the desire to complement the Tower Defense genre and eliminate those idle moments where players would simply speed up the game after placing towers and wait. In Gears of Glory you are in constant motion driving the van to upgrade towers, collect Gears, and run enemies over.

The gameplay and art are influenced by titles such as Gemcraft, Kingdom Rush, Thronefall, Rock and Roll Racing, Biker Mice from Mars, GTA2.

name: Woman Simulator
summary: Experience life as a woman - cleaning, cooking, laundry, and no time to rest. Full immersion into the world of everyday chaos!

name: Ergenekon
summary: Ergenekon is a story-based, cinematic-heavy, linear, third person single player game about the Turkish epic Ergenekon. You will witness the resurrection of the Turks with Ergenekon.

name: NodalBastion
summary: Defend the last AI core in an abstract minimalist game of incremental progression, powerful skills, and evolving networks.

name: Rotato
summary: Spin. Shoot. Survive.

name: Farmare: Ultimate Animal Survive
summary: A survival roguelite RPG where you fight endless waves of enemies, gather upgrades on the fly, and grow your farm base stronger with every run.

name: Eurekas
summary: Eurekas is a real-time strategy colony sim where settlers battle a hostile, mystical island. Build, survive, use magic, and appease your gods—or risk losing everything to the wild forces that resist your claim.

name: Sculptor
summary: Create and paint statues of beautiful women, improve your skills and follow the kinetic novel of a sculptor who fell in love with his creation. The game is inspired by the Greek myth of Pygmalion.

name: Rewind 99
summary: The year is 1999. You're the last remaining video rental store. From humble VHS clerk to rental racketeer - run your video store and explore Reshoot Springs, building an underground empire. Expand with upgrades, side hustles, store membership, and more. Whatever it takes to survive.

name: Táng Chuánqí: Shàng Yuáncháng Gān Xíng
summary: A three-thousand-mile journey of exile, a mystery of untold evil, when strange legends are decoded into reports of social pathology, when the joy of wuxia revenge collides with the ironclad fortress of power, from bandits slaughtering villages to the powerful committing cannibalism, who is not a lamb to be slaughtered in troubled times? This game focuses on the historical backdrop of the An-Shi Rebellion during the Tang Dynasty, and every choice the player makes will mark their character's fate.

name: Overcat
summary: OVERCAT is a 1v1 twin-stick fighting game, where competitive and casual players can finally have a fair fight!

name: Island of Hearts
summary: After a rough breakup, you do what any reasonable person would: run away to a remote tropical island full of beautiful strangers. There, you’ll meet six captivating women, each with her own charm, secrets, and questionable taste in men. Your choices decide who you love, lose, or accidentally ghost.

name: Asantria
summary: An intriguing top-down game with a cartoonish pixel art style! Move around the map in all directions while viewing your character from above! Use various types of magic to shoot and fight monsters! Also use different outfits that will give you additional advantages in the game world!

name: Tabletop Tavern
summary:
Total War meets Slay the Spire in a new RTS rougelike.

Dive into Tabletop Tavern, a real-time strategy roguelike where every battle is a roll of the dice—and every victory is earned. Command your mercenaries on a chaotic tabletop battlefield, recruit a wild roster of warriors, and forge your legacy against relentless goblin hordes. With infinite builds, brutal choices, and endless replayability, this is RTS chaos for roguelike fanatics.

name: SubZero
summary: A frozen apocalypse. Three unique survivors join you. Lead them through the icy wasteland! Zombie whispers, blizzards blur morality... Hope or doom? The fateful die burns in your grip.

name: Maid Mech
summary: In 2060, nanoweapons leaked from an Antarctic ancient ruin transformed Earth lifeforms into deadly bioweapons. As human forces retreat, you—a top frontline commander—are tasked with leading experimental 3rd-gen mech units to defend the most critical zone until civilians evacuate to near-Earth orbit.

name: Rogue Runner
summary: Rogue Runner is a high-speed running, rogue-like, third-person shooter, action, and parkour game. You must run to break the cycle. As you run, you'll discover different possibilities. Run, Kill, Die, Try new skills, and Repeat to break the cycle!

name: Secrets of Suburbia
summary: Investigate a disappearance in a quiet American suburb in 1997—or ignore it entirely. Spend the night browsing the internet, playing video games, and chatting with your friends in this first-person mystery-horror experience.

name: Anchor's Lament
summary: Is a multiplayer roguelike strategy game, where you as your own captain travel the thousands seas to find glory! On your way you gather a crew of exotic animals and creatures that will help you fight other captain's that stand in your way. In this world, all life is sentient.

name: Astrolite
summary: Obliterate ever-growing asteroids in a race against time. Level up your starship to stay on top of the looming threat. Spend well earned Luna Coins on permanent power-ups to skyrocket through the levels. Each mission has unique enemies, challenging bosses, and unlimited variety in gameplay.

name: Troll Chess Sekai
summary: One day, you gain the power to cast a troll spell in a chess game. Eager to try it out, you head to the chess club—where rivals range from novice Mirai to the mysterious owner who surpasses human skill. The rules of chess are no longer safe. Will you seize victory, or be swallowed by chaos?

name: Oceanic Rails
summary: Oceanic Rails is a game about building your island and creating combinations of crops, helpers, animals, modifiers, upgrades and more to pay your rent at the end of the week. Try out challenges and overcome the tricky weather or build you island worry free and create a beautiful pixel art world.

name: Case No.1: Rose Academy
summary: Rose Academy is a detective visual novel about a young special agent sent to an elite girls' school to investigate the mysterious death of one of its top students. As you uncover the dark secrets hidden behind the academy’s flawless facade, you'll be drawn into a world of intrigue, temptation, and romance.

name: Froggy Hates Snow
summary: A survival roguelike where a frog digs through freezing snow, uncovers treasures, unlocks upgrades, and battles mystical creatures. Find the escape door or defeat the final boss to survive.

name: Iron Blight
summary: In a cold, rainy Eastern Bloc town, you find yourself trapped in a room as abominations claw at your door, with nowhere to run. You must survive the feverish night, uncover the horrors lurking in the shadows and above all, find your wife Valeria.

name: Put One In for Johnny Minn
summary:
Stylized physics-soccer arcade puzzle game. Players score using diving headers, volleys, side volleys, and free kicks. Beat levels by discovering the optimal way to solve the level. Timing and precision are needed to make good contact with the ball in order to achieve high contact quality and goal placement scores.

Includes local PvP multiplayer modes: 1v1 (striker vs. keeper) and pass-and-play shot-for-shot party mode for 2-8 local players.

name: Snatch Squad
summary: Imagine Payday in an open world like GTA — built entirely of blocks. Snatch Squad is a co‑op crime sim in a voxel city. Plan and execute heists, launder money through legit businesses, and outsmart the police.

name: Paragnosia: Museum
summary: Watch over the Duskheath Museum with a rail-mounted camera. Closed following a series of disturbing disappearances, your mission is to photograph the anomalies and exorcise the spirits that have taken possession of the premises. Can you survive the 8 rounds through these mysterious exhibition halls?

name: Dosmic
summary: In a world consumed by darkness, a boy embarks on a perilous journey to rescue a lost girl. Navigate through cosmic horrors and unravel ancient mysteries in this cinematic puzzle-adventure. Experience a hauntingly beautiful tale of despair and hope.​

name: VectaGuard: Zero
summary: Arcade-inspired shmup action where neon vector caverns explode with modern visuals, dynamic music, weapon upgrades and intense score chasing.

name: Infinite Game Cartridge Collection: Balloon Story
summary: Inflate the balloon but don't blow it up.

name: The Grey Company
summary: Tabletop Tavern: RTS meets roguelike chaos. Recruit mercenaries, command them in real-time on a tabletop battlefield, and face endless goblin hordes. Unique runs, tough choices, infinite replayability.

name: Echoes of Mora
summary: Embark on a mysterious journey, filled with intriguing interactions and meaningful encounters, as you explore a sunken village and travel through time to help Mora find her lost brother. Playable in VR and non-VR on PC.

name: Fetch Quest Remastered
summary: Would-be adventurer Flora accepts a job to retrieve a stolen item for a shady bartender. To retrieve the item, she'll have to infiltrate a group of notorious bandits by posing as a new recruit. This expands the hit game Fetch Quest with more content, upgraded graphics and unlockable extras through different story routes.

name: Ploink
summary: A plinko roguelike where you create crazy setups with random objects then drop balls and watch the chaos unfold. Discover creative interactions, create cross-dimensional setups, break the game, feed cats and ploink it.

name: Nullpoint Protocol
summary: The feeling of high-level MMO raids, without the grind. Nullpoint Protocol is a 1-4 player co-op action roguelite where you face harbingers of the apocalypse. Craft your own class from randomized loot, master each boss fight, and save your species from extinction!

name: Lumina's Brew
summary: Explore enchanted biomes, gather rare ingredients, and brew potions to sell in this cozy 2D metroidvania. Discover secrets, meet curious creatures, and master the art of potion-making as a young witch on a mystical journey.

name: Rocket Wrestling Entertainment
summary: Throw it down in the newest sport league of 2073: Rocket Wrestling Entertainment. Pelt your foes with a barrage of rockets and powerful takedowns to stand on top!

name: PhantomZone SemiDeus
summary: "A dragon survivor, a rarity in these times." That's what she called herself. Mysterious, bizarre biographical tales unfold in a retro-futuristic world.

name: Comet Tycoon
summary: Build and automate your way to cosmic riches in this satirical tycoon sim. Harvest comets, entertain space tourists, recycle the broke ones, and let COMTEC help you replace humanity… one drone at a time.

name: Ogre Battle 64: Person of Lordly Caliber
summary:
"Ogre Battle 64: Person of Lordly Caliber is a tactical RPG for the Nintendo 64.

Featuring a gripping storyline with multiple possible endings, and a genre-defining character class system, this strategic epic has rightly retained its place in the hearts of tactical RPG fans for over a decade.

The game tells the story of Magnus Gallant, a recently graduated officer of the Palatinean Army who is assigned to the troubled southern region of his native land. There he witnesses the plight of the lower classes – the victims of a tyrannical ruling elite whose only thought is for the preservation of their own lofty status. With civil war brewing, Magnus is faced with a terrible choice: to betray his own noble origins in the name of liberty, or turn a blind eye to the evils of his rotten society."

name: Phantom: Phantom of Inferno
summary: Remake of Phantom of Inferno with completely redrawn art in the style of the 2009's anime. The voice cast was also replaced by the one used in the anime.

name: Warframe
summary: Warframe situates players as members of the Tenno race, newly awoken after years of cryo-sleep into a solar system at war. Reborn into a corrupt era, the Tenno are sought by the oppressive Grineer Empire for annihilation. Warframe armor is the key to overthrowing the Grineer by providing players with unique offensive and defensive powers to explore, upgrade and master during purpose-driven radical raids.

name: Stellar Wanderer
summary: Stellar Wanderer is a beautiful old-school space opera set in a vast open-world universe. Explore the galaxy and become a FIGHTER, TRADER, TANK or ENGINEER while following the main story line or choosing your favorite side missions.

name: Shadow Tactics: Blades of the Shogun
summary: Skillfully hide from and sneak past the enemies fields of view, take their formations apart and hide their bodies to cover your tracks. Quick Save will enable you to execute your plans perfectly. Tactically plan actions for your whole team and execute them all at once. Make use of the vertical gameplay and jump from roof to roof to silently kill your foes from above.

name: Hollow Knight
summary: A 2D metroidvania with an emphasis on close combat and exploration in which the player enters the once-prosperous now-bleak insect kingdom of Hallownest, travels through its various districts, meets friendly inhabitants, fights hostile ones and uncovers the kingdom's history while improving their combat abilities and movement arsenal by fighting bosses and accessing out-of-the-way areas.

name: Fallout 76
summary: Bethesda Game Studios welcome you to Fallout 76. Twenty-five years after the bombs fall you and your fellow Vault Dwellers, chosen from the nation’s best and brightest, emerge into post-nuclear America on Reclamation Day, 2102. Play solo or join together as you explore, quest, build, and triumph against the wasteland’s greatest threats. Explore a vast wasteland, devastated by nuclear war, in this open-world multiplayer addition to the Fallout story. Experience the largest, most dynamic world ever created in the legendary Fallout universe.

name: The Coin Game
summary: A virtual ticket redemption arcade with realistic physics, silly prizes and a bunch of goofy robots. The Coin Game is made by a solo developer. Be sure to add us to your wishlist for new announcements.

name: Lurkers
summary: Lurkers is a chaotic 2D multiplayer sandbox where you can build, battle, and survive! Fight zombies, conquer game modes like Bedwars, and unleash your creativity in a world that’s yours to shape and destroy.

name: Heli 100
summary: Heli 100 is Tree Men Games take on bullet hell / shmup games. Try to survive 100 missions of enemies in a small arena type of battle, be fast, dodge bullets, use power-ups and defeat the enemies. Who will be the best player of HELI 100? Leaderboards start at mission 100!

name: Raanaa: The Shaman Girl
summary:
Raanaa is a third person adventure 3D platformer.
Raanaa, a courageous shaman girl, helps the spirit worlds that are in danger. With the help of her shaman abilities and her magical dress, she can defy gravity.

Raanaa travels through wondrous spirit realms and collaborates with different Gods and Goddesses to fight evil spirits and deities in order to obtain balance in the universe and save humanity.
Raanaa travels through spirit worlds that are all inspired by old Saami and Norse stories and mythology. In every episode the player gets to visit in a new spirit world. Become the savior of the spirit worlds!

name: Sayonara Wild Hearts
summary: Sayonara Wild Hearts is a euphoric music video dream about being awesome, riding motorcycles, skateboarding, dance battling, shooting lasers, wielding swords, and breaking hearts at 200 mph.

name: New Super Lucky's Tale
summary:
Leap into a Playful Platforming Adventure for all ages!

Run, jump, climb incredible heights, burrow deep underground, overcome enemies, and explore amazing worlds on an epic quest to rescue the Book of Ages from the mysterious Jinx and his nefarious Kitty Litter!

Experience an incredible variety of gameplay, ranging from 3D open-world hubs to story-based adventure levels to 2D side-scrolling challenges, rewarding mini-games, mind-bending puzzles, thrilling boss battles, and a memorable cast of characters!
A true love letter to classic 3D platformers, with hundreds of collectibles to gather, tons of rewarding secrets to unlock, and an entire wardrobe of costumes for the stylish adventurer!

New Super Lucky’s Tale features all new levels, story, cinematics and character dialogue, tighter movement and player controls, a fully rotatable 3D camera, and sweet upgrades to nearly every other aspect of the game, including art and lighting, UI, sound, music, and more!

name: Mahou Arms
summary: Mahou Arms is an anime-inspired character-action hack and slash that tells the story of a magical girl paramilitary group fighting back against an alien invasion.

name: Hydroneer
summary: Hydroneer is a mining and base building sandbox. Dig for gold and other resources to turn a profit and enhance your mining operation. Build a base of operations, forge weapons, go fishing, and dig deep!

name: Control: Ultimate Edition
summary: Control Ultimate Edition contains the main game and all previously released Expansions ("The Foundation" and "AWE") in one great value package. Winner of over 80 awards, Control is a visually stunning third-person action-adventure that will keep you on the edge of your seat.

name: Mousebusters
summary: The player character just wanted to move into their new apartment, but when they end up transformed into a mouse they find themselves having to join the Mousebusters to take out the ghosts haunting every resident of the building.

name: Phasmophobia
summary:
Phasmophobia is a 4 player online co-op psychological horror where you and your team members of paranormal investigators will enter haunted locations filled with paranormal activity and gather as much evidence of the paranormal as you can. You will use your ghost hunting equipment to search for and record evidence of whatever ghost is haunting the location to sell onto a ghost removal team.

You can choose to support your team by monitoring the location with CCTV cameras and motion sensors from the safety of the truck or head inside and get your hands dirty with the ghostly activity that will get increasingly hostile as time goes on.

name: Valheim
summary: Valheim is a brutal exploration and survival game for 1-10 players set in a procedurally-generated world inspired by Norse mythology. Craft powerful weapons, construct longhouses, and slay mighty foes to prove yourself to Odin!

name: The Bus
summary: The Bus is the next generation of city bus driving simulation. Sell tickets and transport passengers with various buses on different lines across the German capital Berlin on a realistic scale of 1:1.

name: Bike Baron 2
summary: Bike Baron 2 is a wild motorbike racer packed with monster jumps and explosive hazards. It mixes platforming and puzzle elements with over-the-top physics and pixel-perfect controls. There's no better way to unleash your inner daredevil than to crash your bike from the safety of your room.

name: Going Medieval
summary: Guide a group of villagers to your heart's content in this realistic medieval colony sim. Build farms and fortresses, train an army of raiders or lead the world’s greatest innovators. But never forget to build walls! Threats lurk around every corner.

name: Wasteland Punk
summary: Wasteland Punk is a wild post-apocalyptic RPG where you'll venture into radioactive wastelands and impenetrable swamps, inhabited by bandits, mutants, and something far more dangerous... Kill, scavenge, craft, and survive at any cost!

name: Puzzling Places
summary:
Puzzling Places brings relaxing and wholesome 3D jigsaw puzzling to VR. Put together hyper-realistic miniatures of beautiful places from around the globe. Enter the meditative flow of puzzling and enjoy each place coming alive with their unique & immersive soundscapes as you complete them.

Puzzling Places is a modern take on an age-old pastime that’s fun for the whole family thanks to its simple gameplay and easy controls. Play seated, standing, or at full roomscale!

name: Timberborn
summary: Humans are long gone. In a world struck by droughts and toxic waste, will your lumberpunk beavers do any better? Timberborn is a city-building game featuring ingenious animals, vertical architecture, water physics, and terraforming. Contains high amounts of wood.

name: Shadow Tactics: Blades of the Shogun - Aiko’s Choice
summary: Aiko's Choice is a brand-new standalone addon to the beloved stealth tactics game Shadow Tactics. Set in Japan around the Edo period, you take control of kunoichi adept Aiko and her deadly assassin friends to hunt down the ghosts of her past.

name: Elden Ring
summary:
Elden Ring is an action RPG developed by FromSoftware and published by Bandai Namco Entertainment, released in February 2022. Directed by Hidetaka Miyazaki, with world-building contributions from novelist George R. R. Martin, the game features an expansive open world called the Lands Between. Players assume the role of a customisable character known as the Tarnished, who must explore this world, battle formidable enemies, and seek to restore the Elden Ring to become the Elden Lord.

The game builds on the challenging gameplay mechanics familiar from the Dark Souls series but introduces a more open-ended structure with vast exploration, dynamic weather, and a day-night cycle. It offers deep lore, complex characters, and an interconnected world filled with secrets, dungeons, and powerful bosses.

name: Dungeon Ward
summary: Dungeon Ward blends fast-paced combat, grid-based movement, and flexible character progression. Level up, master powerful skills, and conquer challenging bosses in this action-packed RPG dungeon crawler.

name: Sniper Elite 5
summary:
The latest instalment in the award-winning series, Sniper Elite 5 offers unparalleled sniping, tactical third-person combat and an enhanced kill cam. Fight your way across the most immersive maps yet, with many real-world locations captured in stunning detail, and an improved traversal system that lets you explore more of them than ever before.

France, 1944 – As part of a covert US Rangers operation to weaken the Atlantikwall fortifications along the coast of Brittany, elite marksman Karl Fairburne makes contact with the French Resistance. Soon they uncover a secret Nazi project that threatens to end the war before the Allies can even invade Europe: Operation Kraken.

name: Machine Gun Fury
summary: On a bold and potentially dangerous mission to revive the classic Arcade military shooter. Fully loaded with addictive top-down and side-scrolling run-and-gun gameplay, pixel-perfect 2D graphics, explosive SID soundtrack and massive destruction! Fight on foot and in heavily armed vehicles.

name: Goat Simulator 3
summary: Pilgor’s baaack! Gather your herd and venture forth into Goat Simulator 3; a totally realistic, sandbox farmyard experience. Invite up to three friends in local or online co-op, create carnage together, or compete in mini-games and then not be friends.

name: Big Ambitions
summary: Big Ambitions is a revolutionary role-playing business sim. Go from nothing to the biggest entrepreneur in New York by opening small businesses or slowly building huge corporations any way you like.

name: Hunt the Night
summary: Plunge into a retro-style action-adventure game that combines a fast, skilled gameplay with dark fantasy and lore. Play as Vesper, a virtuous member of 'The Stalkers,' and explore the vast world of Medhram, filled with ruins and horrors.

name: Ant Colony: Wild Forest
summary: You play as the queen of ants, managing an anthill. Ants cannot be controlled directly, but you can create the necessary types of ants; improve them; organize raids, build a dungeon! The goal of each level is to destroy all enemy bases.

name: Endlight
summary: Break through and outlast shifting, twisting, chaos. Fly through surreal landscapes desperately trying to get hoops. Dodging is impossible, so start smashing.

name: Overwatch
summary: Overwatch is a free-to-play, team-based action game set in the optimistic future, where every match is the ultimate 5v5 battlefield brawl. Play as a time-jumping freedom fighter, a beat-dropping battlefield DJ, or one of over 30 other unique heroes as you battle it out around the globe.

name: Iterum
summary:
Engage in tile-based tactical real-time combat, where every maneuver and flanking action can turn the tide of battle. Position your units carefully to outsmart your opponents and secure victory on the field.

Oversee the survival and prosperity of your city through deep seasonal yield management. Store grain for the winter, adapt to unpredictable hazards, and balance rations, taxes, and happiness to keep your people thriving. High taxes and generous rations can both shape your city's fate, just like in classic survival city-builders.

Build and fortify settlements at key locations, exploit and refine resources, and maintain vital supply lines to support your armies on campaign. Every decision matters as you expand your influence and defend your realm.

Unleash your creativity with a custom script-based map editor. Design your own scenarios, craft unique challenges, or relive historical campaigns from the age of the Roman Empire. Shape the world and the stories you want to play.

name: Sea of Stars
summary: Sea of Stars is a turn-based RPG inspired by the classics. Promising the Sabotage touch in every system, Sea of Stars aims to modernize the classic RPG in terms of turn-based combat, storytelling, exploration and interactions with the environment, while still offering a hearty slice of nostalgia and good old, simple fun.

name: Usagi Shima
summary: Usagi Shima is a relaxing, idle bunny collecting game. You’ve been tasked as caretaker of an abandoned island — as you decorate it over time, curious (but adorable!) bunny visitors start to appear! Buy toys, plants, and build structures on an abandoned island to entice curious bun tourists to pay your island a visit. Discover, take photos, and make friends with a variety of bunnies that visit based on how you’ve decorated and arranged the island.

name: Tales of Arise: Beyond the Dawn Edition
summary:
The Beyond the Dawn Edition includes:
• Tales of Arise
• Beyond the Dawn Expansion

Wield the Blazing Sword and join a mysterious, untouchable girl to fight your oppressors.

name: Bloom
summary:
Bloom is a new free casual puzzle about chain reactions and a puppy with a bizarre love for berries. Follow Arya and her dog Bo in an adventure set in vibrant locations and a cute story with witty characters across hundreds of mind-bending logic puzzles.
Done saving the world?

Enjoy an endless catalog of free levels created by players like you, or try the ultra-simple level maker to create your own level and share it with your friends! Show off your creativity and become the best creator in the world!

name: Gothic Classic
summary:
For the first time, relive this amazing RPG on a handheld console and enjoy the game that revolutionized roleplaying games on the go. Dive into dark times and adventures with great performance and a well adapted UI and controls.

War has been waged across the kingdom of Myrtana. Orcish hordes invaded human territory and the king of the land needed a lot of ore to forge enough weapons, should his army stand against this threat. Whoever breaks the law in these darkest of times is sentenced to serve in the giant penal colony of Khorinis, mining the so much needed ore. You are thrown through the barrier into this prison colony. With your back against the wall, you have to survive and form volatile alliances until you can finally escape.

name: Residiuum: Tales of Coral
summary:
Explore a universe rich in personality and full of mysteries.

After the sun went mad and exploded, all that was left of the world was the Auric Earth. A region divided between the Elite with their suited men and their experiments and technologies with the multi-purpose gas Sig, and the less fortunate who must deal with gangs of criminals of various kinds and a hostile environment full of toxic and poisonous substances.

name: Gothic II: Complete Classic
summary:
Continue the story of the Nameless Hero in Gothic II: Complete Classic, the award-winning sequel that improved on its predecessor in every way. Experience it now for the first time on Nintendo Switch.

Gothic II: Complete Classic brings together the excitement of Gothic II and the add-on Night of the Raven to your fingertips for the first time on a console.

name: Disney Dreamlight Valley
summary: Explore a world filled with the magic of Disney as you discover rich stories and build the perfect neighbourhood alongside Disney and Pixar Heroes and Villains in this new life-sim adventure game. Welcome to Disney Dreamlight Valley.

name: Palworld
summary: Palworld is a multiplayer, open-world survival crafting game where you can befriend and collect mysterious creatures called "Pal" in a vast world! Make your Pals fight, build, farm, and work in factories.

name: Beast: Bio Exo Arena Suit Team
summary: Immerse yourself in the cosmic adventure of BEAST! A unique 3V3 online shooter designed for all ages. BEAST combines charm and excitement with intuitive controls.

name: Smalland: Survive the Wilds
summary: Experience a big adventure on a tiny scale! Enjoy multiplayer survival in a vast, hazardous world. Preparation is key when you're this small & at the bottom of the food chain. Craft weapons & armour, tame & ride creatures, build encampments & explore a strange new land.

name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors
summary: A port of the original PS Vita game, in English for the first time.

name: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth
summary: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth is the second entry in the Final Fantasy VII remake project, which retells the story of the genre-redefining RPG across three distinct games. Iconic heroes Cloud, Barret, Tifa, Aerith and Red XIII have escaped from the dystopian city Midgar and are now in pursuit of Sephiroth, the vengeful swordsman from Cloud’s past who was thought to be dead.

name: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth: Digital Deluxe Edition
summary:
Content of the Digital Deluxe Edition:
・ Final Fantasy VII Rebirth main game
・ Digital art book
・ Digital mini soundtrack
・ Summon Materia: Magic Pot
・ Accessory: Reclaimant Choker
・ Armor: Orchid Bracelet

name: Content Warning
summary: Film your friends doing scary things to become SpöökTube famous!

name: Agent Simulator
summary: If you are a sharpshooter, you would be a great fit for us. Within a short period of time, select 3 options from the list and deal with your enemies. Do not forget that the ability of using time efficiently and aiming your targets are crucial. Complete each mission and earn an agent certification.

name: Solo Leveling: Arise
summary: Solo Leveling: Arise is an action RPG based on the South Korean web novel of the same name.

name: Doll Defenders
summary: You were teleported to Male Doll's multiverse with one goal: to save the heroes of our games. However, you may fall in love with them along the way and get the happy final ending you deserve. Are you looking to save the world, or the love of one hot man that’s everything you ever wanted? Don't lie!

name: Lorelei and the Laser Eyes
summary:
A woman, summoned by an eccentric man to participate in a project in an old hotel somewhere in central Europe, becomes embroiled in a game of illusions, increasingly dangerous and surreal.

Now you are invited to fall into the same rabbit hole, in a non-linear mystery with an immense amount of handcrafted puzzles, constantly presenting you with new riddles to solve, each leading you closer to deciphering the enigma of Lorelei and the Laser Eyes.

name: Soulmask
summary: Soulmask is a sandbox game that prioritizes an authentic survival experience. As the "last one" blessed with the mysterious mask, players will grapple for survival in a primitive land steeped in mysterious faiths, carving out a path to ascendance. Start from nothing, explore, build, recruit tribesmen to fortify your clan, and ultimately unravel the mysterious truths hidden behind the civilizations of this world.

name: Kristala
summary:
Kristala is a dark fantasy ARPG featuring Sekiro-inspired combat, acrobatic parkour, and exploration to uncover a detailed story. Embark on a journey to join ranks with Ailur’s most elite warriors as you battle to master the ancient magic of the Sacred Six and uncover the source of a dark curse.

Play as a catlike warrior from one of six clans, each with its own unique magic specialty. Choose your own style of combat: avoid damage by blocking, dashing/rolling, and deflecting attacks; combo light and heavy attacks; utilize multiple weapon abilities; and cast numerous spells.

Your catlike character will be fully customizable via various Talent Trees, including an innovative Feline Skill tree that allows you to unlock and level a multitude of feline-related skills.

name: Go-Go Town!
summary: Thank god you’re here Mayor - you’ve got lots of work to do! In this city building sim, you’re responsible for the layout, logistics optimisation, population growth - all whilst navigating the everyday chaos of infrastructure, worker management and dynamic challenges to make your dream town.

name: Aarik: and the Ruined Kingdom
summary: Aarik (and the ruined kingdom) is a perspective based puzzle game centred around a Prince trying desperately to repair his father's kingdom. Using a magical crown Aarik must grab, roll, move and mend to save his homeland and his family.

name: Baradroid: A Gay Visual Novel
summary: A choice-driven, high-tech, gay visual novel with elements of dating-sim! Choose your baradroid, Live with him, and... Can you teach a robot the meaning of human love?

name: S&box
summary: S&box is a next-generation sandbox platform that lets players instantly play community-made games while creators build limitless experiences using a powerful modern engine. From rapid prototyping to full multiplayer games, everything lives in one connected ecosystem.

name: Wilder World: Super Early Access
summary: Interdimensional refugees known as the Wilders flee Our Base Reality, which has become an AI-controlled dystopia to Wiami, a digital sanctuary in Wilder World. When the authoritarian FORUM attempts to conquer Wiami, the Wilders strategize a defence.

name: Fields of Mistria
summary: Start your new life! Build the farm of your dreams as you discover a world brimming with possibilities. Magic, romance, and adventure all await you in this nostalgic farming / life sim RPG!

name: Shapez 2
summary: Dive into a factory-building game where the focus is on just that — building huge factories! Construct sprawling multi-level factories and min-max your layouts without limits. Shapez 2 is tailor-made for enthusiasts who crave the thrill of optimizing production lines and perfecting automation.

name: Wild West Legacy
summary: Conquer the Wild West. Explore the open world of a fictitious American Midwest and survive the harsh environment. Convince other settlers to join you and manage your ever-growing settlements. Build a home, take care of your farm and become a legend in Wild West Legacy.

name: Under the Red Sky
summary: Under The Red Sky is a 3D parkour game where speed is king! Your goal is to get to the end of each level as quick as possible by taking one of the many different routes possible, or by finding your own. Watch out though, this isn't all fun and games. You may accidentally fall into the past and uncover what happened and how to get back above. You may find that you're now Under the Red Sky.

name: TCG Card Shop Simulator
summary:
Open your own local game store. Stock shelves with the latest booster packs, or crack them and collect the cards for yourself. Set your own prices, hire staff, host events, and expand your card shop.

TCG Card Shop Simulator is a trading card shop simulation where you sell card booster packs to earn money and build your card shop business.

name: The Tag-along Obsession
summary: The Tag-along Obsession is adapted from the movie "The Tag-along", based on the Urban Legend. It is a first-person horror puzzle adventure game, Players will play Hui-Ting and go into the situation to understand a series of supernatural phenomenon, and immerse themselves in the story, looking for the answers to everything.

name: Realm of Ink
summary: Realm of Ink is an Ink-style action Roguelite game. You, the heroine unexpectedly discover that you are just a fictional character within the short story collection Realm of Ink when hunting the Fox. Only by defeating the mysterious Book Spirit can you be liberated from the realm.

name: Heroes of Science and Fiction
summary: Turn-based sci-fi strategy game that combines exploration and exciting clashes on the battlefield. Take control over several different species, raise powerful armies and destroy your opponents!

name: Kinki Spiritual Affairs Bureau
summary: Time to fight back against the spirits! Play as an exorcist with firearms and purge unlawful spirits to solve the mystery of the Saiga village invasion in Nara!

name: Mourning Tide
summary: Mourning Tide is a first-person fishing horror game. A guilt-ridden fisherman ventures into unknown waters. Each catch reveals haunting reminders of his past sins. Unravel the mystery and seek redemption, or be consumed by the mourning tide...

name: Voidwrought
summary: Voidwrought is a 2D action-platformer set in a hand-drawn world of cosmic horrors. Explore the thawing ruins of the First Civilisation and strike down the gods that dwell there. Grow your powers, uncover ancient Artifacts, and expand your shrine amid the wreckage.

name: Portrait of a Torn
summary: As a young soldier returning to an eerily deserted home, you'll explore enigmatic rooms, solve intricate puzzles, and uncover a haunting, tragic story.

name: Scramble: Battle of Britain
summary:
Scramble: Battle of Britain is a simultaneous turn-based dogfighting game. Set in a 3D airspace, the game features fast-paced, tactical combat with dynamic flight physics.
Luftwaffe and RAF fighter squadrons go head to head over The English Channel. Competing players simultaneously issue control inputs for multiple aircraft while time is paused.
The planned orders are then played out simultaneously: shots are fired, loops are looped, colliding planes collide.

name: Homicipher
summary: Homicipher is an adventure horror game where you’ll decipher a language, fall in love and escape. Players will face various horrifying men in this strange world. Your aim is to decipher their language and eventually find a way to escape. Meanwhile, a peculiar feeling also starts to bloom.

name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track
summary: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos! Choose your path in a new world packed with bold biomes and bosses. Permanently upgrade your character and engines, even create and share your own levels - just don‘t let your train derail!

name: Temtem: Swarm
summary: A survivor-like bullet heaven with online co-op up to 3 players

name: Incantation
summary: "Incantation" is a first-person horror mystery game adapted from a movie of the same name. The game reveals the chilling story behind "Chen Village" from the movie. A mother searching for her missing daughter accidentally stumbles into a village filled with mysterious cults. Beyond the palpable madness and fear in the village, there's a sinister force that drives one to despair. What happens when one crosses the forbidden line of this evil deity?

name: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024
summary: Pursue your dream of an aviation career with Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024. This brand-new simulator is designed to take advantage of the latest technologies in simulation, cloud, machine learning, graphics and gaming to create the most sophisticated, immersive and awe-inspiring flight simulator of all time. To achieve this unprecedented level of accuracy, Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 is powered by the significantly evolved Asobo Studio engine.

name: Mado Monogatari: Fia and the Wondrous Academy
summary:
An ancient school of sorcery. Where students study true magic and cultivate their ambitions.

Fia, a girl who aims to be a great sorcerer, leaves her hometown and enrolls in an ancient school of sorcery once attended by her grandmother in order to study sorcery.

Surrounded by strict but humorous instructors, and chaotic but amusing classmates, Fia will study sorcery and develop her abilities.

name: Bang! Bang! Bandits
summary:
Looking for a thrilling yet fun-filled combat experience? Look no further than Bang Bang Bandits! This top-rated entertainment game is a must-try, and trust me, you’ll be hooked from your very first playthrough.

All you need to do is shoot, earn coins, and achieve high scores. Being a first-person shooter, all you have to do is aim and shoot, while movement is taken care of. This allows you to focus on shooting and obtaining a massive amount of rewards. What’s special is that the game does not limit the amount of ammo, so you will never run out of bullets while playing, a truly pure entertainment experience.

If you want to tryhard, the game also has 12 unique levels, each with its own differences and attractions, allowing you to discover countless different ways to play. You start the game with a basic pistol, but don’t worry because you can also upgrade your gun! Over time, the weapon you use will become a laser beam, a Gatling gun, or even a giant rocket.

Feeling too easy with the 12 levels above, Challenge Mode will be something that will excite you. This mode has increasing difficulty, so you can accurately test your skills. You can also join forces with friends in a 2v2 battle to bond or solo 1v1 bring hilarious laughter.

With its engaging but extremely easy-to-learn gameplay, diverse levels and creative upgrades, Bang Bang Bandits is rated to bring unforgettable entertainment moments to all players who have the opportunity to experience the game on hand.

name: Overthrown
summary: Lift and throw anything as you build and manage your kingdom in this chaotic city builder for 1-6 players. Harness the power of your soul-stealing crown to defend your citizens from bandits and mutants, farm the land, and gather resources. Keep citizens happy or see them desert you!

name: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle
summary: Uncover one of history’s greatest mysteries in Indiana Jones and the Great Circle, a first-person, single-player adventure set between the events of Raiders of the Lost Ark and The Last Crusade. You’ll become the legendary archaeologist in this cinematic action-adventure game from MachineGames, the award-winning studio behind the recent Wolfenstein series, and executive produced by Hall of Fame game designer Todd Howard.

name: DigDigDrill
summary: DigDigDrill is an underground mining and resource collecting game. Dig freely for minerals and treasures. Use the items you collect to forge your original drills in a hack-and-slash style equipment system.

name: Path of Mystery: A Brush with Death
summary:
A completely new title from Imagineer and Toybox Inc., Mystery Walk is the first in a three-part serial drama series!

The game is set in Narumisawa, a charming, fictional summer getaway town that feels familiar, as though you have seen it somewhere before…

The story alternates between the present and the past to uncover the truth behind an unsolved case from 30 years ago.

Told through a prologue, 10 episodes, and a mysterious “?” episode, the mysteries deepen with each chapter.

The fully voiced dialogue, brought to life by a talented cast, will make you eager to continue to the next episode. And there are some unexpected names among the voice actors…

Please immerse yourself in the world of Mystery Walk to the fullest!

name: Miniature Land: Four Seasons
summary: An escape room game made by hand-building and photographing miniature scenes. Explore a miniature world in live-action and enjoy feeling like you're really there.

name: Sottaku
summary: Sottaku is a multiplayer video game in which players compete against each other, Geoguessr-style, in order to quickly read or fill in the blanks in cloze or reading sentences, across Chinese, Japanese, and Korean.

name: Once Upon a Dungeon: Infinity
summary: Travel through dark dungeons, defeat dangerous creatures, and collect unique loot as you play endlessly in this hardcore, traditional roguelike.

name: Dragon Ball: Sparking! Zero - Hero of Justice Pack
summary:
DRAGON BALL: Sparking! ZERO HERO OF JUSTICE Pack contains the following contents from the Dragon Ball SUPER: SUPER HERO movie.

- 11 Playable Characters:
• Gohan, Superhero
• Gohan, Superhero Super Saiyan
• Ultimate Gohan, Superhero
• Gohan Beast
• Piccolo, Superhero
• Piccolo, Potential Unleashed
• Orange Piccolo
• Orange Piccolo, Giant Form
• Gamma 1
• Gamma 2
• Cell Max

- New Costume:
• Piccolo, Superhero
This is the costume Piccolo wears when infiltrating the Red Ribbon Army base in Dragon Ball SUPER: SUPER HERO.

- 3 Bonus Battles

Experience the intense battles from the Dragon Ball SUPER: SUPER HERO movie in custom battles, including the fierce fight between Piccolo and Gamma 2, the epic showdown between Gohan and Gamma 1, and the thrilling battle where Gohan and Piccolo face off against Cell Max.

name: Whispers of the Eyeless
summary: Guide your Cult. Oversee your Sanctum. Stay in the Shadows. Serve the Dead Gods.

name: Possessions
summary: In Possessions, perspective changes everything. Solve mesmerizing puzzles by shifting your view and bending reality to your will. Explore a minimalist 3D world filled with illusionary surprises, and uncover a quiet story of connection and family as you progress.

name: Bulbo's Belief System
summary:
Bulbo's Belief System is a puzzle-platformer where knowledge is both a tool and an obstacle. Bulbo believes everything he's told—learning allows him to see, move, and interact, but forgetting is just as important.

Erase walls from existence, ignore gravity to walk across gaps, and manage conflicting beliefs to solve mind-bending challenges. Experiment with what Bulbo knows (or doesn't) to navigate a world where perception shapes reality.

Can you control what Bulbo learns and unlearns to reach the goal?

name: Sovereign Brain Empire
summary: “Who isn’t a baby anyway?”~You travelled to a parallel world governed by the Sovereign Brain AI. In SB Empire, you’re an adopted “one-year-old”, recognized as a "Monarch-level" prodigy! There will be beauties giving you a sheltered babyhood. Your brilliance and privileges will change their fates!

name: Detective VR
summary: Step into a thrilling narrative investigation in Virtual Reality! In DETECTIVE VR, you control time, collect crucial clues, and interview witnesses to unravel the plot.

name: Evocreo II
summary:
Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel
Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer?

name: Grimoire Groves
summary: Restore the magical forest as you grow cute plant creatures with your witch magic in this cozy rogue-lite dungeon crawler. Unlock all spells, discover new plant types, befriend magical creatures, and unravel the mystery of the rainbow socks.

name: Dragonkin: The Banished
summary: In a world ravaged by dragons, play as four heroes, solo or multiplayer, and fight hordes of enemies, adapt your build with the unique Ancestral Grid system, improve your city, and share it with your friends.

name: Eternal Fate: A Journey Begins
summary: Old-school style RPG to enjoy a nostalgic tale with difficult and fair gameplay that is fully voiced.

name: Peppered: An Existential Platformer
summary:
A light hearted 2D platformer about the meaningless of existence. Dark humour. Big focus on narrative-driven gameplay. Regret. Currently being developed for PC and Mac.
You play as a nameless civilian of an immortal world an hour before a return of the God of death. Life presents you with an opportunity to take this matter into your own hands. And then presents you with countless ways to fail spectacularly.

name: CloserLook VR: Oldways
summary: CLoserLook: Old Ways, a captivating interactive story VR adventure game set in modern day west Africa. Awakening in a locked university administrative building, you'll need to solve a series of intricate puzzles to find your way out. As you navigate through the game, explore secret locations and uncover a gripping narrative that delves into themes of exploitation, corruption, and betrayal.

name: South of Midnight
summary: South of Midnight is a new action-adventure from Compulsion Games. Explore the mythos and confront mysterious creatures of the Deep South in this modern folktale while learning to weave an ancient power to surmount obstacles and face the pain haunting your hometown.

name: Hollywood Animal
summary: Make your dreams come true — or crush someone else’s. Take the helm of a major Hollywood studio at the dawn of sound cinema, and guide it through decades of creative achievements and glamor, debauchery and dark deeds, tough choices and unpleasant compromises.

name: Jammer Dash
summary: Jammer Dash is a free rhythm 2D game in which you move and destroy objects on beat made for Windows and Linux! Inspired by many awesome games such as Muse Dash, Geometry Dash and osu!. Made in Unity and C#.

name: Dragon Ball: Sparking! Zero - Dragon Ball Daima: Character Pack 1
summary:
New warriors from the Dragon Ball DAIMA anime series join the battle!

- 8 Playable Characters:
• Goku (Mini), Super Saiyan
• Vegeta (Mini)
• Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan
• Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan 2
• Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan 3
• Glorio
• Panzy
• Majin Kuu

‐ Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit
• New costume for Goku (Mini) that changes his moves

Get the Dragon Ball DAIMA: Character Pack 1 and enjoy new battles!

*Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit is different from Pre-Order Pack Goku (Mini).
*Ownership of Pre-Order Pack Goku (Mini) is not required.
*Equipping the Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit costume on Goku (Mini) will not alter his appearance.
*Equipping the Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit costume on Goku (Mini) will transform his Ultimate Blast into Aura Impact.

name: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered
summary: Explore Cyrodiil like never before with stunning new visuals and refined gameplay in The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered.

name: Deck of Haunts
summary: Deck of Haunts invites you to become a malevolent Haunted House. Lure humans into your cursed halls, manipulate their fears, and drain their essence to grow your power. Use strategy to build your mansion and expand your dark influence, turning your home into a terrifying, inescapable nightmare.

name: The Midnight Walk
summary:
Embark upon The Midnight Walk in this reverent dark fantasy adventure built in clay, from the minds behind Lost in Random and Fe.

Become The Burnt One, befriend a lost lantern creature named Potboy, and use his flame to light your way through a conflicting world of wonder and horror. Survive and outsmart the many monsters eager to devour your little friend’s flame as you experience five tales of fire and darkness, featuring an incredible cast of odd characters.

Marvel at every disturbing detail in a landscape painstakingly handcrafted with real life clay and animated in a stop motion style. Fully playable in both flatscreen and with a VR headset.

name: Frog Legs
summary: A short, single-player horror action game starring Carl, the suburban house frog. Will you be able to conquer arcade challenges, solve puzzles, and Ribbit and Tear your way back to the life you once knew?

name: Volontés
summary: Volontés is an Dark Fantasy × Suspense otome game in which the main character, who has lost everything, finds her way of life while facing tragedy.

name: Ys Memoire: Revelations in Celceta
summary:
Experience a timeless chapter in the storied RPG franchise making its debut on Nintendo Switch, filled with duplicitous schemes, treacherous geography, and secretive characters.

As Adol Christin, search for clues to your past in an epic adventure, making use of strategic combat, and exploring a dangerous world to a newly rearranged OST.

name: Sol Cesto
summary: Sol Cesto is a tactical and frenetic roguelite in which you have to master your luck. Choose a hero and reach the bottom of a random dungeon. In this grim world, every action has consequences...

name: Automate It
summary: Automate It is a factory building game that requires clever solutions to its size, power, and time constraints. Solve challenges, build and share your own levels, or open things up in sandbox mode. If you want to build it - Automate It.

name: Saeko: Giantess Dating Sim
summary: You opened your eyes to find a giant girl looking down at you. Experience the fate of Saeko and the little people in this cruel yet captivating story with avant-garde art.

name: Clover Reset
summary: "Hey, do you know the meaning of the four-leaf clover?" Set at "Shonan Saika Academy," a prestigious school in Shonan, Kanagawa Prefecture, this is a youthful story of girls wavering between friendship and love.

name: Dragon Is Dead
summary: Dragon is Dead is a hack-and-slash, roguelite action platformer. It offers tons of customization fun with different character skill trees and legendary equipment. Overcome repeated deaths to defeat Guernian, the leader of the Dark Dragons.

name: Net.Attack(): Code or Die!
summary: CODE OR DIE! Hack enemy systems & survive the security response by engineering lethal bullet-heaven algorithms. Your brain power determines your firepower across 150+ programming nodes. Debug your failures. Optimize your code. Complete the heist. HACK THE PLANET!

name: Death Stranding 2: On The Beach - Digital Deluxe Edition
summary:
Death Stranding 2: On The Beach full game for PS5.
48h early access
Machine Gun [MP] (Lv.1) early unlock
Patch 70: Quokka
Patch 71: Chiral Cat
Patch 72: Why Me?
Battle Skeleton: Gold (Lv.1)(Lv.2)(Lv.3)
Boost Skeleton: Gold (Lv.1)(Lv.2)(Lv.3)
Bokka Skeleton: Gold (Lv.1)(Lv.2)(Lv.3)

name: Death Stranding 2: On the Beach
summary: Embark on an inspiring mission of human connection beyond the UCA. Sam — with companions by his side — sets out on a new journey to save humanity from extinction. Join them as they traverse a world beset by otherworldly enemies, obstacles and a haunting question: should we have connected?

name: Dragon Ball Sparking Zero: Shallot (Dragon Ball Legends)
summary: Shallot from the mobile game DRAGON BALL LEGENDS joins the battle!

name: Don't Mess With Bober
summary: First-person game with a touch of 80s horror movies, where you face the Beaver, who’s out for revenge.

name: Self Simulated
summary: Self Simulated is a fast-paced precision platformer for the Game Boy Color. Play as a robotic version of yourself and navigate over 100 handcrafted levels filled with enemies, hazards, and glitch-filled dangers. Uncover your past and master tight, responsive controls designed for fast retries and fluid movement.

name: Spirit Crossing
summary: Spirit Crossing is a beautiful cooperative life-sim about building friendships and community. Sign up for our Closed Alpha playtest and discover a world where you can connect, escape, and belong.

name: Back to the Dawn
summary:
A gripping prison escape RPG woven with crime, corruption, and hidden agendas. Step into a maximum-security facility where every inmate has a past—and a plan. You'll have to fight to survive, investigate, and ultimately break free before the time runs out.

Uncover a scheme that threatens more than just your life—it could bring down the entire city. In this thrilling adventure, choices matter, and escape is your only salvation!

name: Magical Girl Witch Trials
summary: Thirteen girls awaken, only to find themselves in a prison. What awaits them: a Witch Trial. Help them prepare for the trial by exploring the prison in order to find the witch hidden amongst them. Find the witch, learn what kind of magic she holds, dispel the lies, and prepare for the execution.

name: Mystic Explorer
summary: Mystic Explorer is a treasure rogue game. Players will play the role of treasure hunter in search of treasure chests in the siege of monsters, defeat the ever stronger enemies, and bring back your own archive treasures.

name: Primal Planet
summary: Unveil a heartfelt story of family, dinosaurs, and UFOs! Craft, upgrade, and survive in a realm of primeval predators, savage tribes and... ancient aliens. Rise from a humble cave dweller to the planet’s last hope — alone or in local co-op. Welcome to the dinovania!

name: Earthion
summary:
Earthion is an upcoming aftermarket shooting game developed by Ancient primarily for the Sega Mega Drive. Physical MD versions will be published by SUPERDELUXE GAMES in Japan and by Limited Run Games in North America. The game will also get a 16:9 version for modern platforms.

Earthion is published under the label YKGGG, a brand name covering all the retro-style games developed at Ancient. If Earthion meets success, Ancient will go on the venture of releasing video games designed for retro consoles. A separate version of the game for Arcade was confirmed by Ancient and published by exA-Arcadia, which features a new, exclusive mode that will not be available in the Mega Drive version.

name: PhotoLoop
summary: PhotoLoop is a casual game about editing photos using an outdated editing software that only has the lasso tool. Make sure to make your edits clean and concise, or you might not be able to pay your rent due in five days!

name: Tiny Bookshop
summary: Leave everything behind and open a Tiny Bookshop by the sea in this ambient narrative management game. Stock your wagon, set up shop in scenic locations, and navigate a post-capitalist future alongside Bookstonbury’s eclectic cast of characters.

name: Out and About
summary: You've come to help your Granny after a terrible storm destroyed her cottage and wreaked havoc in her idyllic coastal town. Can you find a way of restoring her home and uniting the townsfolk? Connect with nature by foraging, gardening, and cooking, then try out your new skills in the real world!

name: Deadzone: Rogue
summary: Deadzone: Rogue is a roguelite first-person shooter set in deep space. Slay hordes of enemies, loot powerful gear, and customize your loadout during each unique run. Uncover fragments of your past as you piece together the truth behind your mission. Fight. Die. Revive. Repeat.

name: Deadzone: Rogue: Operative Pack
summary: Deadzone: Rogue is a roguelite FPS set in space. Blast through hordes of enemies with devastating weapons. Define your combat style with powerful augments and upgrades. Grow stronger with each death, solo or in co-op. Fight. Die. Revive. Repeat.

name: Off
summary: “I’m the Batter. I’ve been entrusted with a sacred mission.” -- One of the most influential RPGs of the last 20 years is finally coming to Steam and Nintendo Switch. Take control of the Batter as he seeks to purify an uncanny and hopeless world haunted by specters, guided by a cryptic, grinning cat called The Judge.

name: Void/Breaker
summary: VOID/BREAKER is an Adrenaline-Fueled Roguelite FPS. Fight relentless machines driven by a hostile AI. Escape an endless cycle. Craft infinite weapon variants with deep gun modding. Forge deadly synergies. Carve your way out through environmental destruction/BREAK THE SYSTEM /BREAK THE SEQUENCE /BREAK FREE

name: Bokyaku Zenya
summary: “Boukyaku Zenya” is a game released as the Japanese localized edition of the highly acclaimed “Morimens,” following meticulous refinements to its worldbuilding, presentation, and game systems.

name: Bean Beasts
summary: Defeat monster hordes alongside your Bean Beasts in this cute, challenging Tower Defense Game! Evolve your companions, explore upgrade paths for traps and take on epic boss battles!

name: Ariana and the Elder Codex
summary:
The Librarian Ariana’s mission is to repair the Seven Hero Codices, which have been altered. Due to the terrible damages, magic has vanished from the world.

By utilizing special Librarian magic that allows her to enter Codices, Ariana seeks to mend the books to bring back magic. Can Ariana safely repair each tome and unravel the mysteries hidden within the Library?

name: Moonlight In Garland
summary: A chill open-ended life sim about finding your feet, making a positive impact and enjoying the journey in the big city. Find an apartment, make friends, grow plants and love your city life!

name: Whisper of the House
summary: What's happening in this seemingly peaceful town? Strange residents, bizarre incidents, and unexpected storylines! Please be sure to let go of all your human lifestyle preferences and strive to meet the special requests of your otherworldly employers. Decorate this house with peculiar furniture!

name: Chark
summary: CHARK is a chess roguelike about risk, synergies, and precise calculation.

name: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle: The Order of Giants
summary: There is a myth of a beast in the hidden depths of Rome, rumored to guard a terrible secret. Indiana Jones and the Great Circle: The Order of Giants DLC is an all-new story chapter that takes Indiana Jones to the ancient streets of Rome where forgotten catacombs twist into something far more sinister. Indy must outwit a dangerous cult and decipher intricate puzzles designed by emperors to uncover the dark legacy of the Nephilim giants.

name: Postal: Brain Damaged - These Sunny Daze
summary: POSTAL: Brain Damaged - These Sunny Daze isn’t “just a DLC” - it’s a tropical serotonin collapse packed with juicy carnage, alleged jokes, overbaked new levels, even less appropriate enemies and unhinged guns. This is another mag of SPF-free mockery fired point-blank at modern life.

name: The Little Tomb: The Maholova Club and the Search for a Dead Body
summary: "Is there a dead body who'd like to be buried in me?" This is a coming-of-age adventure of a young boy who believes he's an ancient tomb! As Kofun, interact with all sorts of characters and objects. Gain points and spend them on new skills and hints to show Kofun a world of new experiences!

name: Starvault
summary:
Choose your hero. Squad up. Push lanes. Farm creeps. Clear jungle camps. Upgrade your abilities mid-match. And dominate the map in intense 5v5 team fights.
Classic MOBA with stunning visuals that push the Meta Quest to its absolute limits.
